content.text:
Blocker / High First
Severity: Blocker  
Title: Core requirements not fully deliverable in Android Views path  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt:105`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt:117`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt:121`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout` (no meeting/invoice/calendar fragment layouts).  
Impact: Primary user flows are incomplete in the required Views-first UX; delivery acceptance for required end-to-end operations is blocked.  
Minimum actionable fix: Implement Android View fragments + navigation for calendar, meeting detail, and invoice detail; wire real ViewModel operations and access guards.
Severity: High  
Title: Attendee privacy rule violated and ABAC not enforced in meeting flow  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/AbacPolicyEvaluator.kt:16`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:111`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:137`.  
Impact: Prompt-required rule "only Supervisors/Admins can view attendee lists" is not met; unauthorized access paths likely remain.  
Minimum actionable fix: Enforce attendee read/write through ABAC checks in DAO/service boundaries and restrict attendee list visibility to Supervisor/Admin per prompt.
Severity: High  
Title: Object-level authorization and user data isolation are not enforced at persistence boundaries  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/OrderDao.kt:18`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/MeetingDao.kt:27`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/CartDao.kt:18`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/repository/CoreRepository.kt:34`.  
Impact: RBAC checks at UI/service layer can be bypassed by future call sites; cross-user reads are structurally possible.  
Minimum actionable fix: Introduce actor-scoped repository methods (ownerId/delegate constraints) and enforce row-level filters in all read/write paths.
Severity: High  
Title: Session auto-expiry not enforced in Android Views runtime path  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/AuthViewModel.kt:100`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt:54`, `composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/App.kt:55`.  
Impact: Prompt security requirement (30-minute idle expiry) can be missed in the primary Android Views flow.  
Minimum actionable fix: Add periodic `ensureSessionActive()` timer/foreground lifecycle hooks in Android Activity/Fragments and force logout on expiry.
Severity: High  
Title: Receipt share requirement not met in Android implementation  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/platform/OrderPlatformGateways.kt:35`, `shared/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/platform/ReceiptService.android.kt:41`.  
Impact: Prompt requires print/share local receipt PDF; implementation stores PDF but explicitly disables share intent.  
Minimum actionable fix: Restore secure share/print flow (FileProvider + chooser/print framework), add permission-safe foreground invocation path, and test coverage.
Severity: High  
Title: Meeting reservation model lacks resource-level conflict integrity  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:69`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:76`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/Entities.kt:141`.  
Impact: conflict checks are not scoped by specific resource/equipment; `resourceId` input is unused, causing incorrect availability logic.  
Minimum actionable fix: Add `resourceId` to `MeetingEntity`, persist it, and enforce conflict queries per resource + buffer in DAO/use-case.
Medium
Severity: Medium  
Title: Refund workflow state-machine invocation is disconnected in finance flow  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModel.kt:191`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/orders/OrderStateMachine.kt:207`.  
Impact: UI can report refund complete without valid order-state transition when `orderId` is null or role checks are not provided.  
Minimum actionable fix: Require linked `orderId`, pass actor role explicitly, and fail UI state if state-machine transitions fail.
Severity: Medium  
Title: Governance/canary components are present but weakly integrated into active flows  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/governance/RuleHitObserver.kt:14`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/GovernanceDao.kt:12`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/config/CanaryConfig.kt:43`, `composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/ui/form/DynamicFormEngine.kt:47`.  
Impact: required offline analytics/rule-hit/canary rollout may exist as isolated utilities rather than enforced operational controls.  
Minimum actionable fix: wire observer startup, persist rule hits from validations, and bind form version resolution to active form rendering path.
Severity: Medium  
Title: Test guidance is partially inconsistent with static local verification expectations  
Conclusion: Fail  
Evidence: `README.md:119`, `run_tests.sh:22`, `run_tests.sh:25`.  
Impact: default test path requires Docker, complicating straightforward static verification for reviewers.  
Minimum actionable fix: provide first-class non-Docker test command path and keep Docker path optional.

32: class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity(), NavigationHost {
33: 
34:     override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
35:         super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
36:         setContentView(R.layout.activity_main)
37: 
38:         if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
39:             ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(this, arrayOf(android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS), 1001)
40:         }
41:         AndroidPlatformContext.initialize(applicationContext)
42:         val passphrase = SecurePassphraseProvider(applicationContext).getOrCreatePassphrase()
43:         val database = AndroidDatabaseFactory(this).create("task136-android.db", passphrase)
44:         initKoinIfNeeded(database, isDebug = BuildConfig.DEBUG)
45: 
46:         val koin = GlobalContext.get()
47: 
48:         // Seed demo accounts (only in debug) + expire stale orders
49:         lifecycleScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
50:             koin.get<LocalAuthService>().seedDemoAccountsIfNeeded()
51:             koin.get<OrderStateMachine>().expireStaleOrders()
52:         }
53: 
54:         // Session expiry monitoring ΓÇö only react to transitions FROM authenticated TO unauthenticated
55:         val authVm: AuthViewModel = koin.get()
56:         var wasAuthenticated = authVm.state.value.isAuthenticated
57:         lifecycleScope.launch {
58:             authVm.state.collectLatest { state ->
59:                 if (wasAuthenticated && !state.isAuthenticated) {
60:                     showLogin()
61:                 }
62:                 wasAuthenticated = state.isAuthenticated
63:             }
64:         }
65: 
66:         if (savedInstanceState == null) {
67:             showLogin()
68:         }
69:     }
70: 
71:     private fun showLogin() {
72:         replaceFragment(LoginFragment(), addToBackStack = false)
73:     }
74: 
75:     private fun showDashboard() {
76:         replaceFragment(DashboardFragment(), addToBackStack = false)
77:     }
78: 
79:     private fun replaceFragment(fragment: Fragment, addToBackStack: Boolean = true) {
80:         val tx = supportFragmentManager.beginTransaction()
81:             .replace(R.id.fragment_container, fragment)
82:         if (addToBackStack) tx.addToBackStack(null)
83:         tx.commit()
84:     }
85: 
86:     // ΓöÇΓöÇ NavigationHost implementation ΓöÇΓöÇ
87: 
88:     override fun onAuthenticated() {
89:         showDashboard()
90:     }
91: 
92:     override fun onLogout() {
93:         val koin = GlobalContext.get()
94:         koin.get<ResourceListViewModel>().clearSessionState()
95:         koin.get<OrderWorkflowViewModel>().clearSessionState()
96:         koin.get<MeetingWorkflowViewModel>().clearSessionState()
97:         koin.get<OrderFinanceViewModel>().clearSessionState()
98:         koin.get<LearningViewModel>().clearSessionState()
99:         val authVm: AuthViewModel = koin.get()
100:         authVm.logout()
101:         showLogin()
102:     }
103: 
104:     override fun navigateToCalendar() {
105:         replaceFragment(DashboardFragment()) // Calendar not yet a Fragment
106:     }
107: 
108:     override fun navigateToCart() {
109:         replaceFragment(CartFragment())
110:     }
111: 
112:     override fun navigateToOrderDetail(orderId: String) {
113:         replaceFragment(OrderDetailFragment.newInstance(orderId))
114:     }
115: 
116:     override fun navigateToInvoiceDetail(invoiceId: String) {
117:         replaceFragment(DashboardFragment()) // Invoice detail not yet a Fragment
118:     }
119: 
120:     override fun navigateToMeetingDetail(meetingId: String) {
121:         replaceFragment(DashboardFragment()) // Meeting detail not yet a Fragment
122:     }
123: 
124:     override fun navigateToLearning() {
125:         replaceFragment(LearningFragment())
126:     }
127: 
128:     override fun navigateBack() {
129:         if (!supportFragmentManager.popBackStackImmediate()) {
130:             showDashboard()
131:         }
132:     }
133: }

<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac
2: 
3: data class AccessContext(
4:     val requesterId: String,
5:     val ownerId: String,
6:     val isDelegate: Boolean,
7:     val deviceTrusted: Boolean,
8: )
9: 
10: class AbacPolicyEvaluator {
11:     fun canReadAttendee(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
12:         if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
13:         return when (role) {
14:             Role.Admin -> true
15:             Role.Supervisor -> true
16:             Role.Operator, Role.Companion -> context.requesterId == context.ownerId || context.isDelegate
17:             Role.Viewer -> context.requesterId == context.ownerId
18:         }
19:     }
20: 
21:     fun canReadInvoiceTaxField(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
22:         if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
23:         return role == Role.Admin
24:     }
25: 
26:     fun canIssueRefund(role: Role, context: AccessContext): Boolean {
27:         if (!context.deviceTrusted) return false
28:         return role == Role.Admin || role == Role.Supervisor
29:     }
30: 
31:     fun buildContext(
32:         requesterId: String,
33:         ownerId: String,
34:         isDelegate: Boolean = false,
35:         deviceTrusted: Boolean,
36:     ): AccessContext = AccessContext(
37:         requesterId = requesterId,
38:         ownerId = ownerId,
39:         isDelegate = isDelegate,
40:         deviceTrusted = deviceTrusted,
41:     )
42: }

<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2: 
3: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingAttendeeEntity
4: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingDao
5: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingEntity
6: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.BookingUseCase
7: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.TimeWindow
8: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.NotificationGateway
9: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action
10: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
11: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType
12: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
13: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
17: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
18: import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
19: import kotlinx.coroutines.cancel
20: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
21: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
22: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
23: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
24: import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
25: import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
26: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
27: 
28: enum class MeetingStatus {
29:     Draft,
30:     PendingApproval,
31:     Approved,
32:     Denied,
33:     CheckedIn,
34:     NoShow,
35: }
36: 
37: data class AttendeeInfo(
38:     val id: String,
39:     val name: String,
40:     val rsvp: String = "Pending",
41: )
42: 
43: data class MeetingWorkflowState(
44:     val status: MeetingStatus = MeetingStatus.Draft,
45:     val meetingId: String? = null,
46:     val meetingStart: Instant? = null,
47:     val agenda: String = "",
48:     val attendees: List<AttendeeInfo> = emptyList(),
49:     val note: String? = null,
50: )
51: 
52: class MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
53:     private val validationService: ValidationService,
54:     private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
55:     private val meetingDao: MeetingDao,
56:     private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
57:     private val bookingUseCase: BookingUseCase,
58:     private val clock: Clock,
59:     private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
60: ) {
61:     private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
62:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(MeetingWorkflowState())
63:     val state: StateFlow<MeetingWorkflowState> = _state.asStateFlow()
64: 
65:     fun submitMeeting(
66:         start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
67:         agenda: String = "",
68:         organizerId: String = "",
69:         resourceId: String = "res-1",
70:     ) {
71:         val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
72:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
73:             // Check for time conflicts
74:             val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
75:             val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
76:             val existingMeetings = meetingDao.page(100)
77:             val existingWindows = existingMeetings
78:                 .filter { it.status != MeetingStatus.Denied.name }
79:                 .map { TimeWindow(
80:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
81:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
82:                 ) }
83: 
84:             if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
85:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
86:                 return@launch
87:             }
88: 
89:             _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
90:                 status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
91:                 meetingId = meetingId,
92:                 meetingStart = start,
93:                 agenda = agenda,
94:                 note = "Awaiting supervisor approval",
95:             )
96:             meetingDao.upsert(
97:                 MeetingEntity(
98:                     id = meetingId,
99:                     organizerId = organizerId,
100:                     title = "Meeting",
101:                     startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
102:                     endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
103:                     status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
104:                     agenda = agenda,
105:                 ),
106:             )
107:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady("mtg-submitted-$meetingId", 0.0)
108:         }
109:     }
110: 
111:     fun addAttendee(name: String) {
112:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
113:         val attendeeId = "att-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
114:         val info = AttendeeInfo(id = attendeeId, name = name)
115:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(attendees = _state.value.attendees + info)
116:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
117:             meetingDao.upsertAttendee(
118:                 MeetingAttendeeEntity(
119:                     id = attendeeId,
120:                     meetingId = meetingId,
121:                     userId = name,
122:                     displayName = name,
123:                 ),
124:             )
125:         }
126:     }
127: 
128:     fun updateAgenda(agenda: String) {
129:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(agenda = agenda)
130:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
131:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
132:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
133:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(agenda = agenda))
134:         }
135:     }
136: 
137:     fun approve(role: Role) {
138:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
139:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Approval denied for role")
140:             return
141:         }
142:         val current = _state.value
143:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
144:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Approved, note = "Approved")
145:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Approved)
146:         scheduleAutoNoShow()
147:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
148:             val meetingId = current.meetingId ?: return@launch
149:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(
150:                 "mtg-approved-$meetingId",
151:                 0.0,
152:             )
153:         }
154:     }
155: 
156:     fun deny(role: Role) {
157:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
158:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Denial denied for role")
159:             return
160:         }
161:         val current = _state.value
162:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
163:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Denied, note = "Denied by supervisor")
164:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Denied)
165:     }
166: 
167:     fun checkIn(role: Role) {
168:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
169:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Check-in denied for role")
170:             return
171:         }
172:         val current = _state.value
173:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
174:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.Approved) return
175: 
176:         val valid = validationService.isWithinSupervisorWindow(start, clock.now())
177:         _state.value = if (valid) {
178:             current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, note = "Checked in within +/-10 minutes")
179:         } else {
180:             current.copy(note = "Outside check-in window")
181:         }
182:         if (valid) persistStatus(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn)
183:     }
184: 
185:     fun markNoShowIfDue(role: Role, now: Instant = clock.now()) {
186:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
187:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "No-show action denied for role")
188:             return
189:         }
190:         val current = _state.value
191:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
192:         if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved && now > start.plus(10.minutes)) {
193:             _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Marked no-show")
194:             persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
195:         }
196:     }
197: 
198:     private fun scheduleAutoNoShow() {
199:         val start = _state.value.meetingStart ?: return
200:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
201:             val waitUntil = start.plus(10.minutes)
202:             val waitDuration = waitUntil - clock.now()
203:             if (waitDuration.isPositive()) {
204:                 delay(waitDuration)
205:             }
206:             val current = _state.value
207:             if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved) {
208:                 _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Auto-marked no-show (10 min past start)")
209:                 persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
210:             }
211:         }
212:     }
213: 
214:     private fun persistStatus(status: MeetingStatus) {
215:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
216:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
217:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
218:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(status = status.name))
219:         }
220:     }
221: 
222:     fun clearSessionState() {
223:         scope.cancel()
224:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
225:         _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState()
226:     }
227: }

(End of file - total 227 lines)
</content>

<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2: 
3: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
4: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.AuthPrincipal
5: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingResult
6: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
7: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.LocalAuthService
8: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.SecurityRepository
9: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
10: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
11: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
12: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
13: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
17: import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
18: import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
19: import kotlin.time.Duration
20: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.hours
21: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
22: 
23: data class AuthUiState(
24:     val username: String = "",
25:     val password: String = "",
26:     val principal: AuthPrincipal? = null,
27:     val error: String? = null,
28:     val sessionExpiresAt: Instant? = null,
29:     val absoluteSessionExpiresAt: Instant? = null,
30: ) {
31:     val isAuthenticated: Boolean get() = principal != null
32:     val role: Role? get() = principal?.role
33: }
34: 
35: class AuthViewModel(
36:     private val securityRepository: SecurityRepository,
37:     private val authService: LocalAuthService,
38:     private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService? = null,
39:     private val deviceFingerprint: String = "",
40:     private val clock: Clock,
41:     private val sessionDuration: Duration = 30.minutes,
42:     private val absoluteSessionLimit: Duration = 8.hours,
43:     private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
44: ) {
45:     private val scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
46:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(AuthUiState())
47:     val state: StateFlow<AuthUiState> = _state.asStateFlow()
48: 
49:     fun updateUsername(value: String) {
50:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(username = value, error = null)
51:     }
52: 
53:     fun updatePassword(value: String) {
54:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(password = value, error = null)
55:     }
56: 
57:     fun login() {
58:         val snapshot = _state.value
59:         val userId = snapshot.username.trim().lowercase()
60:         if (userId.isBlank()) {
61:             _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Username is required")
62:             return
63:         }
64: 
65:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
66:             if (!securityRepository.canAuthenticate(userId, clock.now())) {
67:                 _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Too many attempts. Try again later.")
68:                 return@launch
69:             }
70: 
71:             val principal = authService.authenticate(userId, snapshot.password)
72:             if (principal == null) {
73:                 securityRepository.recordFailure(userId, clock.now())
74:                 _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Invalid username or password")
75:                 return@launch
76:             }
77: 
78:             if (deviceBindingService != null && deviceFingerprint.isNotBlank()) {
79:                 val bindResult = deviceBindingService.checkAndBindDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint)
80:                 if (bindResult is DeviceBindingResult.LimitExceeded) {
81:                     _state.value = snapshot.copy(
82:                         error = "Device limit exceeded (${bindResult.bound}/${bindResult.max}). Ask an Admin to reset your device bindings.",
83:                     )
84:                     return@launch
85:                 }
86:             }
87: 
88:             securityRepository.recordSuccess(userId)
89:             val now = clock.now()
90:             _state.value = snapshot.copy(
91:                 principal = principal,
92:                 error = null,
93:                 password = "",
94:                 sessionExpiresAt = now.plus(sessionDuration),
95:                 absoluteSessionExpiresAt = now.plus(absoluteSessionLimit),
96:             )
97:         }
98:     }
99: 
100:     fun ensureSessionActive() {
101:         val now = clock.now()
102:         val idleExpiry = _state.value.sessionExpiresAt
103:         val absoluteExpiry = _state.value.absoluteSessionExpiresAt
104: 
105:         if (idleExpiry != null && now >= idleExpiry) {
106:             logout("Session expired. Please sign in again.")
107:             return
108:         }
109:         if (absoluteExpiry != null && now >= absoluteExpiry) {
110:             logout("Maximum session duration reached. Please sign in again.")
111:             return
112:         }
113:     }
114: 
115:     fun touchSession() {
116:         val snapshot = _state.value
117:         if (!snapshot.isAuthenticated) return
118:         _state.value = snapshot.copy(sessionExpiresAt = clock.now().plus(sessionDuration))
119:     }
120: 
121:     fun logout(message: String? = null) {
122:         val previous = _state.value
123:         _state.value = AuthUiState(
124:             username = previous.username,
125:             error = message,
126:         )
127:     }
128: }

(End of file - total 128 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform
2: 
3: import android.graphics.Paint
4: import android.graphics.pdf.PdfDocument
5: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
6: import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
7: import java.io.File
8: import java.io.FileOutputStream
9: 
10: actual class ReceiptService {
11:     actual suspend fun generateAndSharePdf(data: ReceiptData) {
12:         try {
13:             val context = AndroidPlatformContext.require()
14: 
15:             withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
16:                 val document = PdfDocument()
17:                 val pageInfo = PdfDocument.PageInfo.Builder(595, 842, 1).create()
18:                 val page = document.startPage(pageInfo)
19: 
20:                 val paint = Paint().apply { textSize = 14f }
21:                 var y = 48f
22:                 page.canvas.drawText("Receipt #${data.receiptId}", 36f, y, paint)
23:                 y += 28f
24:                 page.canvas.drawText("Customer: ${data.customerName}", 36f, y, paint)
25:                 y += 28f
26: 
27:                 data.lineItems.forEach { item ->
28:                     page.canvas.drawText("${item.label}: $${"%.2f".format(item.amount)}", 36f, y, paint)
29:                     y += 24f
30:                 }
31: 
32:                 y += 16f
33:                 page.canvas.drawText("Total: $${"%.2f".format(data.total)}", 36f, y, paint)
34: 
35:                 document.finishPage(page)
36: 
37:                 val file = File(context.cacheDir, "receipt-${data.receiptId}.pdf")
38:                 FileOutputStream(file).use { output -> document.writeTo(output) }
39:                 document.close()
40:             }
41:             // PDF saved to cache. Share intent removed to prevent crashes
42:             // from background/application context. PDF can be accessed at:
43:             // context.cacheDir/receipt-{id}.pdf
44:         } catch (e: Exception) {
45:             println("[ReceiptService] Error generating PDF: ${e.message}")
46:         }
47:     }
48: }
49: 
50: actual fun createReceiptService(): ReceiptService = ReceiptService()

58:     private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
59: ) {
60:     private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
61:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(OrderFinanceState())
62:     val state: StateFlow<OrderFinanceState> = _state.asStateFlow()
63: 
64:     private suspend fun resolveDeviceTrust(userId: String): Boolean {
65:         return deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(userId, deviceFingerprint)
66:     }
67: 
68:     fun addDemoItem(role: Role, actorId: String) {
69:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
70:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Add item denied for role")
71:             return
72:         }
73:         val unitPrice = 49.99
74:         val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(unitPrice)
75:         if (priceError != null) {
76:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
77:             return
78:         }
79:         val itemId = "item-${_state.value.cart.size + 1}"
80:         val next = CartItem(
81:             id = itemId,
82:             label = "Service Package ${_state.value.cart.size + 1}",
83:             quantity = 1,
84:             unitPrice = unitPrice,
85:         )
86:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = _state.value.cart + next, note = null)
87: 
88:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
89:             cartDao.upsert(
90:                 CartItemEntity(
91:                     id = itemId,
92:                     userId = actorId,
93:                     resourceId = "res-1",
94:                     label = next.label,
95:                     quantity = next.quantity,
96:                     unitPrice = next.unitPrice,
97:                 ),
98:             )
99:         }
100:     }
101: 
102:     fun splitFirstItem(role: Role) {
103:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
104:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split denied for role")
105:             return
106:         }
107:         val first = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull() ?: return
108:         if (first.quantity < 2) {
109:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split requires quantity >= 2")
110:             return
111:         }
112:         val left = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-a", quantity = first.quantity / 2)
113:         val right = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-b", quantity = first.quantity - left.quantity)
114:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(left, right) + _state.value.cart.drop(1), note = "Order split")
115:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
116:             cartDao.deleteById(first.id)
117:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = left.id, userId = "", resourceId = "", label = left.label, quantity = left.quantity, unitPrice = left.unitPrice))
118:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = right.id, userId = "", resourceId = "", label = right.label, quantity = right.quantity, unitPrice = right.unitPrice))
119:         }
120:     }
121: 
122:     fun mergeFirstTwoItems(role: Role) {
123:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
124:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Merge denied for role")
125:             return
126:         }
127:         val cart = _state.value.cart
128:         if (cart.size < 2) return
129:         val merged = cart[0].copy(
130:             id = "${cart[0].id}+${cart[1].id}",
131:             quantity = cart[0].quantity + cart[1].quantity,
132:             unitPrice = cart[0].unitPrice,
133:         )
134:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(merged) + cart.drop(2), note = "Orders merged")
135:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
136:             cartDao.deleteById(cart[0].id)
137:             cartDao.deleteById(cart[1].id)
138:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = merged.id, userId = "", resourceId = "", label = merged.label, quantity = merged.quantity, unitPrice = merged.unitPrice))
139:         }
140:     }
141: 
142:     fun generateInvoice(role: Role, actorId: String) {
143:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
144:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Invoice denied for role")
145:             return
146:         }
147:         if (_state.value.cart.isEmpty()) return
148:         val subtotal = _state.value.cart.sumOf { it.unitPrice * it.quantity }
149:         val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(subtotal)
150:         if (priceError != null) {
151:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
152:             return
153:         }
154: 
155:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
156:             val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
157:             val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
158:             val tax = if (abac.canReadInvoiceTaxField(role, context)) subtotal * 0.12 else 0.0
159:             val invoice = InvoiceDraft(
160:                 id = "inv-${_state.value.invoices.size + 1}",
161:                 subtotal = subtotal,
162:                 tax = tax,
163:                 total = subtotal + tax,
164:             )
165:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(invoices = _state.value.invoices + invoice, note = "Invoice generated")
166: 
167:             try {
168:                 notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(invoice.id, invoice.total)
169:             } catch (_: Exception) { /* notification scheduling is best-effort */ }
170: 
171:             try {
172:                 val receiptItems = _state.value.cart.map {
173:                     ReceiptLineItem(label = it.label, amount = it.quantity * it.unitPrice)
174:                 }
175:                 receiptGateway.shareReceipt(invoice.id, actorId, receiptItems, invoice.total)
176:             } catch (_: Exception) { /* receipt generation is best-effort */ }
177:         }
178:     }
179: 
180:     fun refundLatest(role: Role, actorId: String) {
181:         val latest = _state.value.invoices.lastOrNull() ?: return
182:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
183:             val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
184:             val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
185:             if (!abac.canIssueRefund(role, context)) {
186:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund denied for role")
187:                 return@launch
188:             }
189:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(refunds = _state.value.refunds + "Refunded ${latest.id}", note = "Refund completed")
190: 
191:             if (latest.orderId != null && stateMachine != null) {
192:                 stateMachine.requestRefund(latest.orderId)
193:                 stateMachine.completeRefund(latest.orderId)
194:             }
195:         }
196:     }
197: 
198:     fun clearSessionState() {
199:         scope.cancel()
200:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
201:         _state.value = OrderFinanceState()
202:     }
203: }

(End of file - total 203 lines)
</content>

27: @Composable
28: fun App(
29:     resourceListViewModel: ResourceListViewModel,
30:     authViewModel: AuthViewModel,
31:     orderWorkflowViewModel: OrderWorkflowViewModel,
32:     meetingWorkflowViewModel: MeetingWorkflowViewModel,
33:     orderFinanceViewModel: OrderFinanceViewModel,
34:     learningViewModel: LearningViewModel? = null,
35: ) {
36:     val authState by authViewModel.state.collectAsState()
37:     val navigator = remember { AppNavigator() }
38: 
39:     fun clearAllSessionState() {
40:         resourceListViewModel.clearSessionState()
41:         orderWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
42:         meetingWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
43:         orderFinanceViewModel.clearSessionState()
44:         learningViewModel?.clearSessionState()
45:         navigator.resetToDashboard()
46:     }
47: 
48:     LaunchedEffect(authState.isAuthenticated) {
49:         if (!authState.isAuthenticated) {
50:             clearAllSessionState()
51:         }
52:         while (authState.isAuthenticated) {
53:             delay(30_000)
54:             val wasAuthenticated = authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated
55:             authViewModel.ensureSessionActive()
56:             if (wasAuthenticated && !authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated) {
57:                 clearAllSessionState()
58:             }
59:         }
60:     }
61: 
62:     Task136Theme {
63:         if (authState.isAuthenticated) {
64:             val currentScreen by navigator.currentScreen.collectAsState()
65:             val role = authState.role?.name ?: "Unknown"
66:             val roleEnum = authState.role ?: Role.Viewer
67:             val actor = authState.principal?.userId.orEmpty()
68:             val delegate = authState.principal?.delegateForUserId
69: 
70:             val onLogout: () -> Unit = {
71:                 clearAllSessionState()
72:                 authViewModel.logout()
73:             }
74: 
75:             val onNavigate: (Screen) -> Unit = { screen ->
76:                 navigator.navigateTo(screen, roleEnum)
77:             }
78: 
79:             when (val screen = currentScreen) {
80:                 is Screen.Dashboard -> {
81:                     ResourceListScreen(
82:                         viewModel = resourceListViewModel,
83:                         orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
84:                         meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
85:                         orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
86:                         roleLabel = role,
87:                         onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
88:                         onLogout = onLogout,
89:                         actorId = actor,
90:                         delegateForUserId = delegate,
91:                         onNavigate = onNavigate,
92:                     )
93:                 }
94:                 is Screen.Calendar -> {
95:                     CalendarScreen(
96:                         orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
97:                         roleLabel = role,
98:                         actorId = actor,
99:                         onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
100:                         onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
101:                     )
102:                 }
103:                 is Screen.OrderDetail -> {
104:                     if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
105:                         navigator.resetToDashboard()
106:                     } else {
107:                         OrderDetailScreen(
108:                             orderId = screen.orderId,
109:                             orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
110:                             roleLabel = role,
111:                             actorId = actor,
112:                             onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
113:                             onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
114:                         )
115:                     }
116:                 }
117:                 is Screen.Cart -> {
118:                     if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
119:                         navigator.resetToDashboard()
120:                     } else {
121:                         CartScreen(
122:                             orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
123:                             roleLabel = role,
124:                             actorId = actor,
125:                             onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
126:                             onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
127:                         )
128:                     }
129:                 }
130:                 is Screen.InvoiceDetail -> {
131:                     if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
132:                         navigator.resetToDashboard()
133:                     } else {
134:                         InvoiceDetailScreen(
135:                             invoiceId = screen.invoiceId,
136:                             orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
137:                             roleLabel = role,
138:                             actorId = actor,
139:                             onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
140:                             onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
141:                         )
142:                     }
143:                 }
144:                 is Screen.MeetingDetail -> {
145:                     if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
146:                         navigator.resetToDashboard()
147:                     } else {
148:                         MeetingDetailScreen(
149:                             meetingId = screen.meetingId,
150:                             meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
151:                             roleLabel = role,
152:                             actorId = actor,
153:                             onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
154:                             onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
155:                         )
156:                     }
157:                 }
158:             }
159:         } else {
160:             LoginScreen(
161:                 state = authState,
162:                 onUsernameChange = authViewModel::updateUsername,
163:                 onPasswordChange = authViewModel::updatePassword,
164:                 onLoginClick = authViewModel::login,
165:             )
166:         }
167:     }
168: }

82:     }

85:         orderWorkflowViewModel.suggestSlots(actorRole)

112:                 }
113:                 Spacer(Modifier.width(16.dp))
114:                 Column {
115:                     Text(

119:                     )
120:                     Text(

122:                         style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,

124:                     )
125:                 }
126:             }
127:         }
128: 
129:         // Month navigation

131:             modifier = Modifier
132:                 .fillMaxWidth()
133:                 .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 8.dp),
134:             horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
135:             verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
136:         ) {
137:             FilledTonalButton(
138:                 onClick = {
139:                     val prevMonth = monthStart.monthNumber - 1
140:                     selectedDate = if (prevMonth < 1) {
141:                         LocalDate(monthStart.year - 1, 12, 1)
142:                     } else {
143:                         LocalDate(monthStart.year, prevMonth, 1)
144:                     }
145:                 },
146:                 shape = RoundedCornerShape(10.dp),

153:             }

158:             FilledTonalButton(

172:             ) {

88:                         if (meetingState.note != null) {

39: 
40: private val Purple = Color(0xFF6C5CE7)

44: 
45: @Composable
46: fun InvoiceDetailScreen(
47:     invoiceId: String,
48:     orderFinanceViewModel: OrderFinanceViewModel,
49:     roleLabel: String,
50:     actorId: String,
51:     onBack: () -> Unit,
52:     onActivity: () -> Unit,
53: ) {
54:     val financeState by orderFinanceViewModel.state.collectAsState()
55:     val actorRole = Role.entries.firstOrNull { it.name == roleLabel } ?: Role.Viewer
56:     val invoice = financeState.invoices.firstOrNull { it.id == invoiceId }
57: 
58:     Column(Modifier.fillMaxSize().background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background)) {
59:         Box(
60:             Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
61:                 .background(Brush.verticalGradient(listOf(Green, Green.copy(alpha = 0.85f))))
62:                 .padding(horizontal = 20.dp, vertical = 16.dp).padding(top = 24.dp),
63:         ) {

65:                 OutlinedButton(onClick = onBack, shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
66:                     colors = ButtonDefaults.outlinedButtonColors(contentColor = Color.White),
67:                     border = BorderStroke(1.dp, Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.4f))) {
68:                     Text("Back", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge)
69:                 }
70:                 Spacer(Modifier.width(16.dp))
71:                 Column {
72:                     Text("Invoice", style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium, color = Color.White)
73:                     Text(invoiceId, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.8f))
74:                 }
75:             }
76:         }
77:

79:             if (invoice != null) {
80:                 item {
81:                     Card(Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
82:                         colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface),
83:                         elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(2.dp)) {
84:                         Column(Modifier.padding(16.dp)) {
85:                             Row(Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween) {
86:                                 Text("Subtotal", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium)
87:                                 Text("$${"%,.2f".format(invoice.subtotal)}", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium)
88:                             }
89:                             Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
90:                             Row(Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween) {
91:                                 Text("Tax", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium)
92:                                 Text("$${"%,.2f".format(invoice.tax)}", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = if (invoice.tax > 0) Amber else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
93:                             }
94:                             Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
95:                             Divider()
96:                             Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
97:                             Row(Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween) {
98:                                 Text("Total", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
99:                                 Text("$${"%,.2f".format(invoice.total)}", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Purple)
100:                             }
101:                         }
102:                     }
103:                 }
104: 
105:                 item {
106:                     Spacer(Modifier.height(16.dp))
107:                     val isRefunded = financeState.refunds.any { it.contains(invoiceId) }
108:                     if (isRefunded) {
109:                         Card(Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
110:                             colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = Coral.copy(alpha = 0.08f))) {
111:                             Text("Refunded", Modifier.padding(16.dp), style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, color = Coral)
112:                         }
113:                     } else {
114:                         FilledTonalButton(
115:                             onClick = { orderFinanceViewModel.refundLatest(actorRole, actorId); onActivity() },
116:                             enabled = roleLabel == "Admin" || roleLabel == "Supervisor",
117:                             shape = RoundedCornerShape(10.dp),
118:                             colors = ButtonDefaults.filledTonalButtonColors(containerColor = Coral.copy(alpha = 0.12f), contentColor = Coral),
119:                         ) {
120:                             Text("Issue Refund", fontSize = 12.sp)
121:                         }
122:                     }
123:                 }
124:             } else {
125:                 item {
126:                     Text("Invoice not found.", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
127:                 }
128:             }
129:         }
130:     }
131: }

<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders
2: 
3: import androidx.room.withTransaction
4: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.AppDatabase
5: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderEntity
6: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderLineItemEntity
7: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.logging.AppLogger
8: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
9: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
10: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
11: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
12: import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
13: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.filterNotNull
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
17: import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
18: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
19: 
20: enum class OrderState {
21:     Draft,
22:     PendingTender,
23:     Confirmed,
24:     Cancelled,
25:     Expired,
26:     PartiallyFulfilled,
27:     ReturnRequested,
28:     Returned,
29:     ExchangeRequested,
30:     Exchanged,
31:     RefundRequested,
32:     Refunded,
33:     AwaitingDelivery,
34:     Delivered,
35: }
36: 
37: enum class DeliveryState {
38:     None,
39:     AwaitingDelivery,
40:     InTransit,
41:     Delivered,
42:     DeliveryConfirmed,
43: }
44: 
45: enum class PaymentMethod {
46:     Cash,
47:     InternalWallet,
48:     ExternalTender,
49: }
50: 
51: const val MIN_PRICE = 0.01
52: const val MAX_PRICE = 9_999.99
53: 
54: private const val TAG = "OrderStateMachine"
55: 
56: open class OrderStateMachine(
57:     private val database: AppDatabase,
58:     private val clock: Clock,
59: ) {
60:     private val scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
61: 
62:     protected open suspend fun <R> runInTransaction(block: suspend () -> R): R {
63:         return database.withTransaction { block() }
64:     }
65: 
66:     fun observeState(orderId: String): Flow<OrderState> {
67:         return database.orderDao().observeById(orderId)
68:             .filterNotNull()
69:             .map { OrderState.valueOf(it.state) }
70:     }
71: 
72:     fun validatePrice(price: Double): String? {
73:         if (price < MIN_PRICE) return "Price must be at least $$MIN_PRICE"
74:         if (price > MAX_PRICE) return "Price must not exceed $$MAX_PRICE"
75:         return null
76:     }
77: 
78:     suspend fun transitionToPendingTender(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): String? {
79:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return "Denied: Viewer cannot create orders"
80:         val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
81:         val expiresAt = clock.now().plus(30.minutes).toEpochMilliseconds()
82: 
83:         var error: String? = null
84:         runInTransaction {
85:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction
86:             val priceError = validatePrice(order.totalPrice)
87:             if (priceError != null) {
88:                 error = priceError
89:                 return@runInTransaction
90:             }
91:             val pending = order.copy(state = OrderState.PendingTender.name, expiresAt = expiresAt)
92:             database.orderDao().update(pending)
93:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId transitioned to PendingTender")
94: 
95:             val resource = database.resourceDao().getById(order.resourceId)
96:             if (resource != null) {
97:                 val newUnits = (resource.availableUnits - order.quantity).coerceAtLeast(0)
98:                 database.resourceDao().update(resource.copy(availableUnits = newUnits))
99:                 AppLogger.i(TAG, "Reserved ${order.quantity} units for $orderId, remaining: $newUnits")
100:             }
101:         }
102: 
103:         if (error != null) return error
104: 
105:         scope.launch {
106:             delay(30.minutes)
107:             runInTransaction {
108:                 val latest = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction
109:                 if (latest.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name && (latest.expiresAt ?: now) <= clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()) {
110:                     database.orderDao().update(latest.copy(state = OrderState.Expired.name))
111:                     restockInventory(latest)
112:                     AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId auto-expired after 30 minutes")
113:                 }
114:             }
115:         }
116:         return null
117:     }
118: 
119:     suspend fun confirm(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
120:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
121:         return runInTransaction {
122:             val latest = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
123:             if (latest.state != OrderState.PendingTender.name) return@runInTransaction false
124:             database.orderDao().update(latest.copy(state = OrderState.Confirmed.name, expiresAt = null))
125:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId confirmed")
126:             true
127:         }
128:     }
129: 
130:     suspend fun cancel(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
131:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
132:         return runInTransaction {
133:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
134:             if (order.state == OrderState.Cancelled.name ||
135:                 order.state == OrderState.Expired.name ||
136:                 order.state == OrderState.Refunded.name
137:             ) return@runInTransaction false
138:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Cancelled.name))
139:             if (order.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name || order.state == OrderState.Confirmed.name) {
140:                 restockInventory(order)
141:             }
142:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId cancelled, inventory restocked")
143:             true
144:         }
145:     }
146: 
147:     suspend fun requestReturn(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
148:         if (role == Role.Viewer || role == Role.Companion) return false
149:         return runInTransaction {
150:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
151:             if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name && order.state != OrderState.Delivered.name) return@runInTransaction false
152:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.ReturnRequested.name))
153:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Return requested for $orderId")
154:             true
155:         }
156:     }
157: 
158:     suspend fun completeReturn(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
159:         if (role == null || (role != Role.Admin && role != Role.Supervisor)) return false
160:         return runInTransaction {
161:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
162:             if (order.state != OrderState.ReturnRequested.name) return@runInTransaction false
163:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Returned.name))
164:             restockInventory(order)
165:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Return completed for $orderId, inventory restocked")
166:             true
167:         }
168:     }
169: 
170:     suspend fun requestExchange(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
171:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
172:         return runInTransaction {
173:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
174:             if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name && order.state != OrderState.Delivered.name) return@runInTransaction false
175:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.ExchangeRequested.name))
176:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Exchange requested for $orderId")
177:             true
178:         }
179:     }
180: 
181:     suspend fun completeExchange(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
182:         if (role == null || (role != Role.Admin && role != Role.Supervisor)) return false
183:         return runInTransaction {
184:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
185:             if (order.state != OrderState.ExchangeRequested.name) return@runInTransaction false
186:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Exchanged.name))
187:             restockInventory(order)
188:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Exchange completed for $orderId, inventory restocked")
189:             true
190:         }
191:     }
192: 
193:     suspend fun requestRefund(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
194:         if (role == Role.Viewer || role == Role.Companion) return false
195:         return runInTransaction {
196:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
197:             if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name &&
198:                 order.state != OrderState.Delivered.name &&
199:                 order.state != OrderState.Returned.name
200:             ) return@runInTransaction false
201:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.RefundRequested.name))
202:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Refund requested for $orderId")
203:             true
204:         }
205:     }
206: 
207:     suspend fun completeRefund(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
208:         if (role == null || (role != Role.Admin && role != Role.Supervisor)) return false
209:         return runInTransaction {
210:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
211:             if (order.state != OrderState.RefundRequested.name) return@runInTransaction false
212:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Refunded.name))
213:             restockInventory(order)
214:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Refund completed for $orderId, inventory restocked")
215:             true
216:         }
217:     }
218: 
219:     suspend fun markAwaitingDelivery(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
220:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
221:         return runInTransaction {
222:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
223:             if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name) return@runInTransaction false
224:             database.orderDao().update(
225:                 order.copy(
226:                     state = OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name,
227:                     deliveryState = DeliveryState.AwaitingDelivery.name,
228:                 ),
229:             )
230:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId awaiting delivery")
231:             true
232:         }
233:     }
234: 
235:     suspend fun markInTransit(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
236:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
237:         return runInTransaction {
238:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
239:             if (order.state != OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name) return@runInTransaction false
240:             database.orderDao().update(
241:                 order.copy(deliveryState = DeliveryState.InTransit.name),
242:             )
243:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId marked in transit")
244:             true
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     suspend fun confirmDelivery(orderId: String, signature: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
249:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
250:         return runInTransaction {
251:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
252:             if (order.state != OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name) return@runInTransaction false
253:             database.orderDao().update(
254:                 order.copy(
255:                     state = OrderState.Delivered.name,
256:                     deliveryState = DeliveryState.DeliveryConfirmed.name,
257:                     deliverySignature = signature,
258:                 ),
259:             )
260:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Delivery confirmed for $orderId with signature")
261:             true
262:         }
263:     }
264: 
265:     suspend fun splitOrder(orderId: String, splitQuantity: Int): Pair<String, String>? {
266:         return runInTransaction {
267:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction null
268:             if (order.quantity < 2 || splitQuantity < 1 || splitQuantity >= order.quantity) return@runInTransaction null
269: 
270:             val leftQty = splitQuantity
271:             val rightQty = order.quantity - splitQuantity
272:             val leftPrice = kotlin.math.round(order.totalPrice * leftQty / order.quantity * 100) / 100.0
273:             val rightPrice = kotlin.math.round((order.totalPrice - leftPrice) * 100) / 100.0
274: 
275:             val leftId = "${orderId}-a"
276:             val rightId = "${orderId}-b"
277: 
278:             val leftOrder = order.copy(
279:                 id = leftId,
280:                 quantity = leftQty,
281:                 totalPrice = leftPrice,
282:                 state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
283:             )
284:             val rightOrder = order.copy(
285:                 id = rightId,
286:                 quantity = rightQty,
287:                 totalPrice = rightPrice,
288:                 state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
289:             )
290: 
291:             database.orderDao().upsert(leftOrder)
292:             database.orderDao().upsert(rightOrder)
293:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId)
294: 
295:             val lineItems = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId)
296:             lineItems.forEach { item ->
297:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-a", orderId = leftId))
298:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-b", orderId = rightId))
299:             }
300: 
301:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId split into $leftId and $rightId")
302:             Pair(leftId, rightId)
303:         }
304:     }
305: 
306:     suspend fun mergeOrders(orderId1: String, orderId2: String): String? {
307:         return runInTransaction {
308:             val order1 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId1) ?: return@runInTransaction null
309:             val order2 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId2) ?: return@runInTransaction null
310:             if (order1.userId != order2.userId) return@runInTransaction null
311: 
312:             val mergedId = "${orderId1}+${orderId2}"
313:             val merged = order1.copy(
314:                 id = mergedId,
315:                 quantity = order1.quantity + order2.quantity,
316:                 totalPrice = order1.totalPrice + order2.totalPrice,
317:             )
318:             database.orderDao().upsert(merged)
319:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId1)
320:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId2)
321: 
322:             val items1 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId1)
323:             val items2 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId2)
324:             (items1 + items2).forEach { item ->
325:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(orderId = mergedId))
326:             }
327: 
328:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Orders $orderId1 and $orderId2 merged into $mergedId")
329:             mergedId
330:         }
331:     }
332: 
333:     suspend fun expireStaleOrders() {
334:         val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
335:         val stale = database.orderDao().getExpiredPendingOrders(now)
336:         stale.forEach { order ->

339:                 if (latest.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name) {

<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac
2: 
3: enum class Role { Admin, Supervisor, Operator, Viewer, Companion }
4: 
5: enum class ResourceType { Resource, Order, User, Wallet, Analytics, Ledger }
6: 
7: enum class Action { Read, Write, Delete, Approve }
8: 
9: data class PermissionRule(
10:     val role: Role,
11:     val resource: ResourceType,
12:     val field: String,
13:     val allowedActions: Set<Action>,
14: )
15: 
16: class PermissionEvaluator(
17:     private val rules: List<PermissionRule>,
18: ) {
19:     fun canAccess(role: Role, resource: ResourceType, field: String, action: Action): Boolean {
20:         return rules.any { rule ->
21:             rule.role == role &&
22:                 rule.resource == resource &&
23:                 (rule.field == field || rule.field == "*") &&
24:                 action in rule.allowedActions
25:         }
26:     }
27: 
28:     suspend fun <T> guardOrNull(
29:         role: Role,
30:         resource: ResourceType,
31:         field: String,
32:         action: Action,
33:         valueProvider: suspend () -> T,
34:     ): T? = if (canAccess(role, resource, field, action)) valueProvider() else null
35: }
36: 
37: fun defaultRules(): List<PermissionRule> = listOf(

<content>100: **Optional:** Start ADB on the host before building if you want auto-install:
101: 
102: ```bash
103: adb start-server
104: adb devices          # verify your device shows "device" (authorized)
105: ```
106: 
107: ### Dev mode (continuous rebuild + auto-install)
108: 
109: ```bash
110: docker compose --profile dev up --build dev
111: ```
112: 
113: Edit code on the host, save, and it auto-rebuilds + pushes to device. Works without a device too (just rebuilds). Press `Ctrl+C` to stop.
114: 
115: ### How ADB works from Docker
116: 
117: The container does **not** run its own ADB server. It connects to your host's ADB server at `host.docker.internal:5037`. Your device's USB authorization is handled by the host -- no conflicts.
118: 
119: ## Run Tests
120: 
121: ```bash
122: ./run_tests.sh
123: ```
124: 
125: Or directly:
126: 
127: ```bash
128: ./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
129: ```
130: 
131: Runs all 166 unit tests across 16 test files using fakes and in-memory stores -- no emulator, no device, no APK build required.
132: 
133: ## Local non-Docker path
134: 
135: ```bash
136: ./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
137: adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
138: ```
139: 
140: Windows PowerShell:
141: 
142: ```powershell
143: .\gradlew.bat :composeApp:assembleDebug
144: adb install -r composeApp\build\outputs\apk\debug\composeApp-debug.apk
145: ```
146: 
147: ## Demo Accounts
148: 
149: Demo accounts are seeded automatically on first launch in debug builds only (`BuildConfig.DEBUG`).
150: 
151: | Username     | Password       | Role       | Notes |
152: |-------------|---------------|------------|-------|
153: | admin       | Admin1234!    | Admin      | Full access, can reset device bindings |
154: | supervisor  | Super1234!    | Supervisor | Can approve/deny meetings, complete returns/refunds |
155: | operator    | Oper12345!    | Operator   | Can create orders, check in to meetings |
156: | viewer      | Viewer1234    | Viewer     | Read-only access |
157: | companion   | Companion1!   | Companion  | Delegated access for operator, cannot approve or refund |
158: 
159: ## Database Schema (v5)
160: 
161: | Entity                  | Table               | Purpose                          |
162: |------------------------|--------------------|---------------------------------|
163: | `UserEntity`           | `users`            | Credentials, roles, lockout state, delegation |
164: | `ResourceEntity`       | `resources`        | Bookable resources with allergens |
165: | `CartItemEntity`       | `cart_items`       | Shopping cart per user            |
166: | `OrderEntity`          | `orders`           | Orders with delivery state, payment method, notes, tags |
167: | `OrderLineItemEntity`  | `order_line_items` | Line items per order              |
168: | `DeviceBindingEntity`  | `device_bindings`  | Device fingerprints per user (2 max) |
169: | `MeetingEntity`        | `meetings`         | Meeting requests with agenda and attachments |

metadata.preview:
**Optional:** Start ADB on the host before building if you want auto-install:

```bash
adb start-server
adb devices          # verify your device shows "device" (authorized)
```

### Dev mode (continuous rebuild + auto-install)

```bash
docker compose --profile dev up --build dev
```

Edit code on the host, save, and it auto-rebuilds + pushes to device. Works without a device too (just rebuilds). Press `Ctrl+C` to stop.

### How ADB works from Docker

The container does **not** run its own ADB server. It connects to your host's ADB server at `host.docker.internal:5037`. Your device's USB authorization is handled by the host -- no conflicts.

## Run Tests

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Running Task-136 shared module unit tests ==="
echo ""

# Detect whether we are already inside the Docker container
# by checking for the Android SDK that the Dockerfile installs.
if [ -d "/opt/android-sdk" ]; then
    # Inside container ΓÇô run Gradle directly
    if [ -f "./gradlew" ]; then
        GRADLE="./gradlew"
        chmod +x "$GRADLE" 2>/dev/null || true
    else
        GRADLE="gradle"
    fi

    $GRADLE :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon "$@"
else
    # Stop the app service first ΓÇö it shares /workspace and its Gradle

48:     suspend fun authenticate(username: String, password: String): AuthPrincipal? {
49:         val user = userDao.getById(username) ?: return null
50:         if (!user.isActive) return null
51:         val candidateHash = pbkdf2Hash(password = password, salt = user.passwordSalt)
52:         if (!constantTimeEquals(user.passwordHash, candidateHash)) return null
53:         val role = try { Role.valueOf(user.role) } catch (_: Exception) { return null }
54:         return AuthPrincipal(
55:             userId = user.id,
56:             displayName = user.fullName,
57:             role = role,
58:             delegateForUserId = user.delegateForUserId,
59:         )
60:     }
61:

63:         val username: String,
64:         val password: String,
65:         val displayName: String,
66:         val role: Role,
67:         val delegateFor: String? = null,
68:     )
69: }
