<content>1: package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2: 
3: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingAttendeeEntity
4: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingDao
5: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingEntity
6: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.BookingUseCase
7: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.TimeWindow
8: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.NotificationGateway
9: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action
10: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
11: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType
12: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
13: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
17: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
18: import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
19: import kotlinx.coroutines.cancel
20: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
21: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
22: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
23: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
24: import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
25: import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
26: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
27: 
28: enum class MeetingStatus {
29:     Draft,
30:     PendingApproval,
31:     Approved,
32:     Denied,
33:     CheckedIn,
34:     NoShow,
35: }
36: 
37: data class AttendeeInfo(
38:     val id: String,
39:     val name: String,
40:     val rsvp: String = "Pending",
41: )
42: 
43: data class MeetingWorkflowState(
44:     val status: MeetingStatus = MeetingStatus.Draft,
45:     val meetingId: String? = null,
46:     val meetingStart: Instant? = null,
47:     val agenda: String = "",
48:     val attendees: List<AttendeeInfo> = emptyList(),
49:     val note: String? = null,
50: )
51: 
52: class MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
53:     private val validationService: ValidationService,
54:     private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
55:     private val meetingDao: MeetingDao,
56:     private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
57:     private val bookingUseCase: BookingUseCase,
58:     private val clock: Clock,
59:     private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
60: ) {
61:     private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
62:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(MeetingWorkflowState())
63:     val state: StateFlow<MeetingWorkflowState> = _state.asStateFlow()
64: 
65:     fun submitMeeting(
66:         start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
67:         agenda: String = "",
68:         organizerId: String = "",
69:         resourceId: String = "res-1",
70:     ) {
71:         val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
72:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
73:             // Check for time conflicts
74:             val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
75:             val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
76:             val existingMeetings = meetingDao.page(100)
77:             val existingWindows = existingMeetings
78:                 .filter { it.status != MeetingStatus.Denied.name }
79:                 .map { TimeWindow(
80:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
81:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
82:                 ) }
83: 
84:             if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
85:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
86:                 return@launch
87:             }
88: 
89:             _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
90:                 status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
91:                 meetingId = meetingId,
92:                 meetingStart = start,
93:                 agenda = agenda,
94:                 note = "Awaiting supervisor approval",
95:             )
96:             meetingDao.upsert(
97:                 MeetingEntity(
98:                     id = meetingId,
99:                     organizerId = organizerId,
100:                     title = "Meeting",
101:                     startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
102:                     endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
103:                     status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
104:                     agenda = agenda,
105:                 ),
106:             )
107:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady("mtg-submitted-$meetingId", 0.0)
108:         }
109:     }
110: 
111:     fun addAttendee(name: String) {
112:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
113:         val attendeeId = "att-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
114:         val info = AttendeeInfo(id = attendeeId, name = name)
115:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(attendees = _state.value.attendees + info)
116:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
117:             meetingDao.upsertAttendee(
118:                 MeetingAttendeeEntity(
119:                     id = attendeeId,
120:                     meetingId = meetingId,
121:                     userId = name,
122:                     displayName = name,
123:                 ),
124:             )
125:         }
126:     }
127: 
128:     fun updateAgenda(agenda: String) {
129:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(agenda = agenda)
130:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
131:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
132:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
133:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(agenda = agenda))
134:         }
135:     }
136: 
137:     fun approve(role: Role) {
138:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
139:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Approval denied for role")
140:             return
141:         }
142:         val current = _state.value
143:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
144:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Approved, note = "Approved")
145:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Approved)
146:         scheduleAutoNoShow()
147:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
148:             val meetingId = current.meetingId ?: return@launch
149:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(
150:                 "mtg-approved-$meetingId",
151:                 0.0,
152:             )
153:         }
154:     }
155: 
156:     fun deny(role: Role) {
157:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
158:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Denial denied for role")
159:             return
160:         }
161:         val current = _state.value
162:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
163:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Denied, note = "Denied by supervisor")
164:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Denied)
165:     }
166: 
167:     fun checkIn(role: Role) {
168:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
169:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Check-in denied for role")
170:             return
171:         }
172:         val current = _state.value
173:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
174:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.Approved) return
175: 
176:         val valid = validationService.isWithinSupervisorWindow(start, clock.now())
177:         _state.value = if (valid) {
178:             current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, note = "Checked in within +/-10 minutes")
179:         } else {
180:             current.copy(note = "Outside check-in window")
181:         }
182:         if (valid) persistStatus(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn)
183:     }
184: 
185:     fun markNoShowIfDue(role: Role, now: Instant = clock.now()) {
186:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
187:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "No-show action denied for role")
188:             return
189:         }
190:         val current = _state.value
191:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
192:         if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved && now > start.plus(10.minutes)) {
193:             _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Marked no-show")
194:             persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
195:         }
196:     }
197: 
198:     private fun scheduleAutoNoShow() {
199:         val start = _state.value.meetingStart ?: return
200:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
201:             val waitUntil = start.plus(10.minutes)
202:             val waitDuration = waitUntil - clock.now()
203:             if (waitDuration.isPositive()) {
204:                 delay(waitDuration)
205:             }
206:             val current = _state.value
207:             if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved) {
208:                 _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Auto-marked no-show (10 min past start)")
209:                 persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
210:             }
211:         }
212:     }
213: 
214:     private fun persistStatus(status: MeetingStatus) {
215:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
216:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
217:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
218:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(status = status.name))
219:         }
220:     }
221: 
222:     fun clearSessionState() {
223:         scope.cancel()
224:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
225:         _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState()
226:     }
227: }

(End of file - total 227 lines)
</content>

+        val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
+        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {

+            val context = AccessContext(

+                    id = attendeeId,
+                    meetingId = existing.id,
+                    userId = name,
+                    displayName = name,
+                ),
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    fun loadMeetingDetail(meetingId: String, role: Role, actorId: String, ownerId: String = actorId, isDelegate: Boolean = false) {
+        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
+            val meeting = when (role) {
+                Role.Admin, Role.Supervisor -> meetingDao.getById(meetingId)
+                else -> meetingDao.getByIdForOrganizer(meetingId, actorId)
+            }
+            if (meeting == null) {
+                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Meeting not found or access denied")
+                return@launch
+            }
+
+            val trusted = deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(actorId, deviceFingerprint)
+            val context = AccessContext(
+                requesterId = actorId,
+                ownerId = ownerId,
+                isDelegate = isDelegate,
+                deviceTrusted = trusted,
+            )
+            val canSeeAttendees = abacPolicyEvaluator.canReadAttendee(role, context)
+            val attendees = if (canSeeAttendees) {
+                meetingDao.getAttendees(meetingId).map {
+                    AttendeeInfo(id = it.id, name = it.displayName, rsvp = it.rsvpStatus)
+                }
+            } else {
+                emptyList()
+            }
+
+            _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
+                status = MeetingStatus.valueOf(meeting.status),
+                meetingId = meeting.id,
+                meetingStart = Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(meeting.startTime),
+                agenda = meeting.agenda,
+                attendees = attendees,
+                note = if (canSeeAttendees) null else "Attendee list restricted to Supervisor/Admin",
+            )
+        }
+    }
*** End Patch"}

package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel

import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingAttendeeEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingDao
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.MeetingEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderDao
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.OrderEntity
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.orders.BookingUseCase
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.platform.NotificationGateway
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.defaultRules
import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.emptyFlow
import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
import kotlin.test.Test
import kotlin.test.assertEquals

class MeetingWorkflowViewModelTest {
    private val fakeMeetingDao = object : MeetingDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(meeting: MeetingEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun update(meeting: MeetingEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getById(id: String): MeetingEntity? = null
        override fun observeById(id: String): Flow<MeetingEntity?> = emptyFlow()
        override suspend fun getByOrganizer(userId: String, limit: Int) = emptyList<MeetingEntity>()
        override suspend fun page(limit: Int) = emptyList<MeetingEntity>()
        override suspend fun upsertAttendee(attendee: MeetingAttendeeEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getAttendees(meetingId: String) = emptyList<MeetingAttendeeEntity>()
        override suspend fun removeAttendee(id: String) = Unit
    }

    private val fakeNotificationGateway = object : NotificationGateway {
        override suspend fun scheduleInvoiceReady(invoiceId: String, total: Double) = Unit
    }

    private val fakeOrderDao = object : OrderDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(order: OrderEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun update(order: OrderEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getById(orderId: String): OrderEntity? = null
        override fun observeById(orderId: String): Flow<OrderEntity?> = emptyFlow()
        override suspend fun getActiveByResource(resourceId: String) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun deleteById(orderId: String) = Unit
        override suspend fun page(limit: Int) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun getExpiredPendingOrders(nowMillis: Long) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun sumGrossByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
        override suspend fun sumRefundsByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
    }

    private fun createVm(clock: Clock): MeetingWorkflowViewModel {
        return MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
            validationService = ValidationService(clock),
            permissionEvaluator = PermissionEvaluator(defaultRules()),
            meetingDao = fakeMeetingDao,
            notificationGateway = fakeNotificationGateway,
            bookingUseCase = BookingUseCase(fakeOrderDao, clock),
            clock = clock,
            ioDispatcher = Dispatchers.Unconfined,
        )
    }

    @Test
    fun `meeting moves through submit approve checkin`() {
        val clock = FixedMeetingClock(Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z"))
        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.approve(Role.Supervisor)
        vm.checkIn(Role.Operator)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, vm.state.value.status)
    }

    @Test
    fun `supervisor can deny meeting`() {
        val clock = FixedMeetingClock(Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z"))
        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.deny(Role.Supervisor)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.Denied, vm.state.value.status)
    }
}

private class FixedMeetingClock(var current: Instant) : Clock {
    override fun now(): Instant = current
}

class MeetingWorkflowViewModelTest {
    private val fakeMeetingDao = object : MeetingDao {
        override suspend fun upsert(meeting: MeetingEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun update(meeting: MeetingEntity) = Unit
        override suspend fun getById(id: String): MeetingEntity? = null

        override suspend fun upsert(binding: DeviceBindingEntity) = Unit

        override suspend fun deleteById(orderId: String) = Unit

        override suspend fun getExpiredPendingOrders(nowMillis: Long) = emptyList<OrderEntity>()
        override suspend fun sumGrossByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
        override suspend fun sumRefundsByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = 0.0
    }

    private fun createVm(clock: Clock): MeetingWorkflowViewModel {
        return MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
            validationService = ValidationService(clock),
            permissionEvaluator = PermissionEvaluator(defaultRules()),
            abacPolicyEvaluator = AbacPolicyEvaluator(),
            deviceBindingService = DeviceBindingService(fakeDeviceBindingDao, clock),
            meetingDao = fakeMeetingDao,
            notificationGateway = fakeNotificationGateway,
            bookingUseCase = BookingUseCase(fakeOrderDao, clock),
            clock = clock,
            ioDispatcher = Dispatchers.Unconfined,
        )
    }

    @Test
    fun `meeting moves through submit approve checkin`() {
        val clock = FixedMeetingClock(Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z"))
        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.approve(Role.Supervisor)
        vm.checkIn(Role.Operator)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, vm.state.value.status)
    }

    @Test
    fun `supervisor can deny meeting`() {
        val clock = FixedMeetingClock(Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z"))
        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.deny(Role.Supervisor)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.Denied, vm.state.value.status)
    }
}

private class FixedMeetingClock(var current: Instant) : Clock {
    override fun now(): Instant = current
}

        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.approve(Role.Supervisor)
        vm.checkIn(Role.Operator)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, vm.state.value.status)
    }

    @Test
    fun `supervisor can deny meeting`() {
        val clock = FixedMeetingClock(Instant.parse("2026-03-30T10:00:00Z"))
        val vm = createVm(clock)

        vm.submitMeeting(clock.now())
        vm.deny(Role.Supervisor)

        assertEquals(MeetingStatus.Denied, vm.state.value.status)
    }
}

private class FixedMeetingClock(var current: Instant) : Clock {
    override fun now(): Instant = current
}

500: internal class InMemoryOrderStore {
501:     private val map = mutableMapOf<String, OrderEntity>()
502:     fun put(order: OrderEntity) { map[order.id] = order }
503:     fun get(id: String) = map[id]
504: 
505:     fun toDao() = object : OrderDao {
506:         override suspend fun upsert(order: OrderEntity) { map[order.id] = order }
507:         override suspend fun update(order: OrderEntity) { map[order.id] = order }
508:         override suspend fun getById(orderId: String) = map[orderId]
509:         override fun observeById(orderId: String): Flow<OrderEntity?> = emptyFlow()
510:         override suspend fun getActiveByResource(resourceId: String) = map.values.filter { it.resourceId == resourceId && it.state != "Cancelled" }
511:         override suspend fun deleteById(orderId: String) { map.remove(orderId) }
512:         override suspend fun page(limit: Int) = map.values.take(limit)
513:         override suspend fun getExpiredPendingOrders(nowMillis: Long) = map.values.filter {
514:             it.state == "PendingTender" && it.expiresAt != null && it.expiresAt <= nowMillis
515:         }
516:         override suspend fun sumGrossByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = map.values
517:             .filter { it.state in listOf("Confirmed", "Delivered", "AwaitingDelivery") && it.createdAt in fromMillis until toMillis }
518:             .sumOf { it.totalPrice }
519:         override suspend fun sumRefundsByDateRange(fromMillis: Long, toMillis: Long) = map.values
520:             .filter { it.state in listOf("Refunded", "Returned") && it.createdAt in fromMillis until toMillis }
521:             .sumOf { it.totalPrice }
522:     }
523: }
524: 
525: internal class InMemoryResourceStore {
526:     private val map = mutableMapOf<String, ResourceEntity>()
527:     fun put(res: ResourceEntity) { map[res.id] = res }
528:     fun get(id: String) = map[id]
529: 
530:     fun toDao() = object : ResourceDao {
531:         override suspend fun upsert(resource: ResourceEntity) { map[resource.id] = resource }
532:         override suspend fun upsertAll(resources: List<ResourceEntity>) { resources.forEach { map[it.id] = it } }
533:         override suspend fun update(resource: ResourceEntity) { map[resource.id] = resource }
534:         override suspend fun getById(id: String) = map[id]
535:         override suspend fun page(limit: Int, offset: Int) = map.values.drop(offset).take(limit)
536:         override suspend fun countAll() = map.size
537:     }
538: }
539:

543:  * This fake overrides the abstract DB methods; the `withTransaction` extension

563:     override fun learningDao() = throw NotImplementedError()
564:     override fun createInvalidationTracker() = throw NotImplementedError()
565:     override fun clearAllTables() = Unit
566: }

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="#F8F9FE">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="#FDAA48"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="20dp"
        android:paddingTop="40dp">
        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/backButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Back"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
            android:text="Shopping Cart"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="22sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/cartRecyclerView"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:padding="12dp" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:padding="12dp">
        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/addItemBtn"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Add Item"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/checkoutBtn"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Checkout"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/noteText"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:padding="12dp"
        android:textColor="#FF7675"
        android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>

+        android:id="@+id/slotText"

+        android:textColor="#2D3436" />
+
+    <TextView

+        android:orientation="horizontal"
+        android:paddingHorizontal="12dp">
+
+        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
+            android:id="@+id/suggestButton"
+            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
+            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
+            android:text="Suggest Slots"

+            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
+
+        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton

+

+            android:text="Open Meeting"

+            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

files.after:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="#F8F9FE">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="#74B9FF"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="20dp"
        android:paddingTop="40dp">

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/backButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Back"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
            android:text="Calendar"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="22sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/slotText"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:padding="16dp"
        android:text="No suggested slots"
        android:textColor="#2D3436" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/meetingStatusText"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="12dp"
        android:textColor="#00B894" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingHorizontal="12dp">

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/suggestButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Suggest Slots"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/submitMeetingButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
            android:text="Submit Meeting"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/openMeetingButton"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
            android:text="Open Meeting"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
    </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

+
+            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
+                android:id="@+id/denyBtn"
+                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
+                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
+                android:text="Deny"
+                android:textAllCaps="false"
+                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
+                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
+
+            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton

files.after:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#F8F9FE">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:background="#00B894"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:padding="20dp"
            android:paddingTop="40dp">

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/backButton"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Back"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginStart="16dp">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="Meeting Detail"
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="22sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/meetingIdText"
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:textColor="#B3FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="13sp" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/statusText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:padding="16dp"
            android:textColor="#00B894"
            android:textSize="20sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/agendaText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingBottom="8dp"
            android:textColor="#2D3436" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/attendeesText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp"
            android:textColor="#2D3436" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/noteText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:background="#1A00B894"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp"
            android:textColor="#008060"
            android:visibility="gone" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:padding="16dp">

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/addAttendeeBtn"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Add Attendee"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/approveBtn"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Approve"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/denyBtn"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Deny"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/checkInBtn"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Check-in"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#F8F9FE">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:background="#00B894"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:padding="20dp"
            android:paddingTop="40dp">

            <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
                android:id="@+id/backButton"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Back"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:layout_marginStart="16dp">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="Invoice Detail"
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="22sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/invoiceIdText"
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:textColor="#B3FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="13sp" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/subtotalText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingTop="16dp"
            android:textColor="#2D3436"
            android:textSize="16sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/taxText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingTop="8dp"
            android:textColor="#2D3436"
            android:textSize="16sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/totalText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingTop="8dp"
            android:textColor="#6C5CE7"
            android:textSize="22sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/noteText"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#1AFF7675"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:textColor="#FF7675"
            android:visibility="gone" />

        <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
            android:id="@+id/refundBtn"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_margin="16dp"
            android:text="Issue Refund"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Running Task-136 shared module unit tests ==="
echo ""

# Detect whether we are already inside the Docker container
# by checking for the Android SDK that the Dockerfile installs.
if [ -d "/opt/android-sdk" ]; then
    # Inside container ΓÇô run Gradle directly
    if [ -f "./gradlew" ]; then
        GRADLE="./gradlew"
        chmod +x "$GRADLE" 2>/dev/null || true
    else
        GRADLE="gradle"
    fi

    $GRADLE :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon "$@"
else
    # Stop the app service first ΓÇö it shares /workspace and its Gradle
    # locks conflict with the test run.
    docker compose stop app 2>/dev/null || true

    # Run tests inside the container with an isolated GRADLE_USER_HOME
    docker compose run --rm --no-deps \
        -e GRADLE_USER_HOME=/tmp/gradle-test \
        app bash -lc \
        "chmod +x ./gradlew 2>/dev/null || true; ./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon $*"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== All tests passed ==="

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Running Task-136 shared module unit tests ==="
echo ""

# Detect whether we are already inside the Docker container
# by checking for the Android SDK that the Dockerfile installs.
if [ -d "/opt/android-sdk" ]; then
    # Inside container ΓÇô run Gradle directly
    if [ -f "./gradlew" ]; then
        GRADLE="./gradlew"
        chmod +x "$GRADLE" 2>/dev/null || true
    else
        GRADLE="gradle"
    fi

    $GRADLE :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon "$@"
elif [ -f "./gradlew" ]; then
    chmod +x ./gradlew 2>/dev/null || true
    ./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon "$@"
elif [ -f "./gradlew.bat" ]; then
    ./gradlew.bat :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon "$@"
else
    # Stop the app service first ΓÇö it shares /workspace and its Gradle
    # locks conflict with the test run.
    docker compose stop app 2>/dev/null || true

    # Run tests inside the container with an isolated GRADLE_USER_HOME
    docker compose run --rm --no-deps \
        -e GRADLE_USER_HOME=/tmp/gradle-test \
        app bash -lc \
        "chmod +x ./gradlew 2>/dev/null || true; ./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest --no-daemon $*"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== All tests passed ==="

12: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Action
13: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.PermissionEvaluator
14: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.ResourceType
15: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
16: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
17: import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.services.ValidationService
18: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
19: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
20: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
21: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
22: import kotlinx.coroutines.delay

28: import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
29: import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
30: import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
31: 
32: enum class MeetingStatus {
33:     Draft,
34:     PendingApproval,
35:     Approved,
36:     Denied,
37:     CheckedIn,
38:     NoShow,
39: }
40: 
41: data class AttendeeInfo(
42:     val id: String,
43:     val name: String,
44:     val rsvp: String = "Pending",
45: )
46: 
47: data class MeetingWorkflowState(
48:     val status: MeetingStatus = MeetingStatus.Draft,
49:     val meetingId: String? = null,
50:     val meetingStart: Instant? = null,
51:     val agenda: String = "",
52:     val attendees: List<AttendeeInfo> = emptyList(),
53:     val note: String? = null,
54: )
55: 
56: class MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
57:     private val validationService: ValidationService,
58:     private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
59:     private val abacPolicyEvaluator: AbacPolicyEvaluator,
60:     private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService,
61:     private val meetingDao: MeetingDao,
62:     private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
63:     private val bookingUseCase: BookingUseCase,
64:     private val clock: Clock,
65:     private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
66:     private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
67: ) {
68:     private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
69:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(MeetingWorkflowState())
70:     val state: StateFlow<MeetingWorkflowState> = _state.asStateFlow()
71: 
72:     fun submitMeeting(
73:         start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
74:         agenda: String = "",
75:         organizerId: String = "",
76:         resourceId: String = "res-1",
77:     ) {
78:         val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
79:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
80:             // Check for time conflicts
81:             val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
82:             val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
83:             val existingMeetings = meetingDao.pageByResource(resourceId = resourceId, limit = 100)
84:             val existingWindows = existingMeetings
85:                 .map { TimeWindow(
86:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
87:                     kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
88:                 ) }
89: 
90:             if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
91:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
92:                 return@launch
93:             }
94: 
95:             _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
96:                 status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
97:                 meetingId = meetingId,
98:                 meetingStart = start,
99:                 agenda = agenda,
100:                 note = "Awaiting supervisor approval",
101:             )
102:             meetingDao.upsert(
103:                 MeetingEntity(
104:                     id = meetingId,
105:                     organizerId = organizerId,
106:                     resourceId = resourceId,
107:                     title = "Meeting",
108:                     startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
109:                     endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
110:                     status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
111:                     agenda = agenda,
112:                 ),
113:             )
114:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady("mtg-submitted-$meetingId", 0.0)
115:         }
116:     }
117: 
118:     fun addAttendee(name: String, role: Role, actorId: String, ownerId: String = actorId, isDelegate: Boolean = false) {
119:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
120:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
121:             val trusted = deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(actorId, deviceFingerprint)
122:             val context = AccessContext(
123:                 requesterId = actorId,
124:                 ownerId = ownerId,
125:                 isDelegate = isDelegate,
126:                 deviceTrusted = trusted,
127:             )
128:             if (!abacPolicyEvaluator.canReadAttendee(role, context)) {
129:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Attendee access denied")
130:                 return@launch
131:             }
132: 
133:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: run {
134:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Meeting not found")
135:                 return@launch
136:             }
137: 
138:             val attendeeId = "att-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
139:             val info = AttendeeInfo(id = attendeeId, name = name)
140:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(attendees = _state.value.attendees + info, note = null)
141:             meetingDao.upsertAttendee(
142:                 MeetingAttendeeEntity(
143:                     id = attendeeId,
144:                     meetingId = existing.id,
145:                     userId = name,
146:                     displayName = name,
147:                 ),
148:             )
149:         }
150:     }
151: 
152:     fun loadMeetingDetail(meetingId: String, role: Role, actorId: String, ownerId: String = actorId, isDelegate: Boolean = false) {
153:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
154:             val meeting = when (role) {
155:                 Role.Admin, Role.Supervisor -> meetingDao.getById(meetingId)
156:                 else -> meetingDao.getByIdForOrganizer(meetingId, actorId)
157:             }
158:             if (meeting == null) {
159:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Meeting not found or access denied")
160:                 return@launch
161:             }
162: 
163:             val trusted = deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(actorId, deviceFingerprint)
164:             val context = AccessContext(
165:                 requesterId = actorId,
166:                 ownerId = ownerId,
167:                 isDelegate = isDelegate,
168:                 deviceTrusted = trusted,
169:             )
170:             val canSeeAttendees = abacPolicyEvaluator.canReadAttendee(role, context)
171:             val attendees = if (canSeeAttendees) {
172:                 meetingDao.getAttendees(meetingId).map {
173:                     AttendeeInfo(id = it.id, name = it.displayName, rsvp = it.rsvpStatus)
174:                 }
175:             } else {
176:                 emptyList()
177:             }
178: 
179:             _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
180:                 status = MeetingStatus.valueOf(meeting.status),
181:                 meetingId = meeting.id,
182:                 meetingStart = Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(meeting.startTime),
183:                 agenda = meeting.agenda,
184:                 attendees = attendees,
185:                 note = if (canSeeAttendees) null else "Attendee list restricted to Supervisor/Admin",
186:             )
187:         }
188:     }
189: 
190:     fun updateAgenda(agenda: String) {
191:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(agenda = agenda)
192:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
193:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
194:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
195:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(agenda = agenda))
196:         }
197:     }
198: 
199:     fun approve(role: Role) {
200:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
201:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Approval denied for role")
202:             return
203:         }
204:         val current = _state.value
205:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
206:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Approved, note = "Approved")
207:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Approved)
208:         scheduleAutoNoShow()
209:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
210:             val meetingId = current.meetingId ?: return@launch
211:             notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(
212:                 "mtg-approved-$meetingId",
213:                 0.0,
214:             )
215:         }
216:     }
217: 
218:     fun deny(role: Role) {
219:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
220:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Denial denied for role")
221:             return
222:         }
223:         val current = _state.value
224:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
225:         _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Denied, note = "Denied by supervisor")
226:         persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Denied)
227:     }
228: 
229:     fun checkIn(role: Role) {
230:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
231:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Check-in denied for role")
232:             return
233:         }
234:         val current = _state.value
235:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
236:         if (current.status != MeetingStatus.Approved) return
237: 
238:         val valid = validationService.isWithinSupervisorWindow(start, clock.now())
239:         _state.value = if (valid) {
240:             current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, note = "Checked in within +/-10 minutes")
241:         } else {
242:             current.copy(note = "Outside check-in window")
243:         }
244:         if (valid) persistStatus(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn)
245:     }
246: 
247:     fun markNoShowIfDue(role: Role, now: Instant = clock.now()) {
248:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
249:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "No-show action denied for role")
250:             return
251:         }
252:         val current = _state.value
253:         val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
254:         if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved && now > start.plus(10.minutes)) {
255:             _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Marked no-show")
256:             persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
257:         }
258:     }
259: 
260:     private fun scheduleAutoNoShow() {
261:         val start = _state.value.meetingStart ?: return
262:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
263:             val waitUntil = start.plus(10.minutes)
264:             val waitDuration = waitUntil - clock.now()
265:             if (waitDuration.isPositive()) {
266:                 delay(waitDuration)
267:             }
268:             val current = _state.value
269:             if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved) {
270:                 _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Auto-marked no-show (10 min past start)")
271:                 persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
272:             }
273:         }
274:     }
275: 
276:     private fun persistStatus(status: MeetingStatus) {
277:         val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
278:         scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
279:             val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
280:             meetingDao.update(existing.copy(status = status.name))
281:         }
282:     }
283: 
284:     fun clearSessionState() {
285:         scope.cancel()
286:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
287:         _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState()
288:     }
289: }

content.text:
Implemented a substantial pass on the blocker/high items so the Android Views path now has real end-to-end screens and tighter authorization/session behavior.

- Added Android View fragments + layouts for the missing flows and wired navigation from `MainActivity`:
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/ui/CalendarFragment.kt`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/ui/MeetingDetailFragment.kt`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/ui/InvoiceDetailFragment.kt`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout/fragment_calendar.xml`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout/fragment_meeting_detail.xml`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout/fragment_invoice_detail.xml`
  - `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt`

- Enforced session-expiry checks in Android Views runtime path:
  - periodic `ensureSessionActive()` loop in activity
  - foreground check in `onResume()`
  - idle touch extension via `onUserInteraction()`
  - file: `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/MainActivity.kt`

- Tightened attendee privacy/ABAC:
  - `canReadAttendee` now only allows Supervisor/Admin
  - attendee add/read now uses ABAC + device trust in meeting VM
  - meeting detail loading now conditionally hides attendee list
  - files:
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/AbacPolicyEvaluator.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/di/SharedModule.kt`

- Added resource-scoped meeting conflict integrity:
  - persisted `resourceId` on meetings
  - conflict query now filters by resource
  - files:
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/Entities.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/MeetingDao.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt`

- Improved object-level data isolation at persistence boundaries:
  - added actor-scoped DAO methods for orders/carts/meetings
  - updated order/cart flows to use user-scoped access/deletes
  - file set:
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/OrderDao.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/CartDao.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/MeetingDao.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/repository/CoreRepository.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderWorkflowViewModel.kt`
    - `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModel.kt`

- Fixed refund state-machine disconnect:
  - refund now requires linked order + state machine transitions to succeed
  - role is passed into refund transitions
  - failure now surfaces to UI note instead of silently ΓÇ£completedΓÇ¥
  - file: `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModel.kt`

- Restored Android receipt share flow:
  - generates PDF + shares via `FileProvider` chooser
  - file: `shared/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/platform/ReceiptService.android.kt`

- Improved non-Docker local verification path:
  - `run_tests.sh` now prefers local `gradlew`/`gradlew.bat` before Docker fallback
  - file: `run_tests.sh`

I also updated affected tests/fakes for new DAO and VM signatures in:
- `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModelTest.kt`
- `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModelTest.kt`
- `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/orders/BookingUseCaseTest.kt`
- `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/orders/OrderStateMachineTest.kt`

Verification note: I could not run unit tests in this environment because Android SDK is not configured (`ANDROID_HOME` / `local.properties` missing).  

1) If you want, I can do a second pass specifically for the governance/canary wiring findings.  
2) If you set SDK path, I can run the full shared test suite and fix any compile/runtime fallout immediately.

### Blocker / High

1) **Severity: Blocker**  
**Title:** Missing delivery documentation and static verification playbook  
**Conclusion:** Fail  
**Evidence:** `run_tests.sh:1`, `settings.gradle.kts:19`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml:24`  
**Impact:** Reviewer/operator cannot reliably reproduce startup/config/test verification without reverse-engineering internals.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Add `README.md` with prerequisites, build/run/test commands, module map, account/bootstrap strategy, and static audit checklist.

2) **Severity: High**  
**Title:** Core business flows implemented as demos/hardcoded behavior  
**Conclusion:** Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderWorkflowViewModel.kt:57`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModel.kt:68`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderWorkflowViewModel.kt:248`  
**Impact:** Delivered app cannot be trusted as a production offline operations suite; behavior diverges from required real workflows.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Replace demo entry points with real CRUD-driven booking/order flows and user-input resource/order selection.

3) **Severity: High**  
**Title:** Regular users cannot add attendees despite prompt requirement  
**Conclusion:** Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:118`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:128`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/AbacPolicyEvaluator.kt:16`  
**Impact:** Meeting-request flow is materially broken for non-supervisor users.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Separate attendee write permission from attendee read visibility; allow organizer/delegate attendee add while keeping list visibility restricted.

4) **Severity: High**  
**Title:** Delegation support is incomplete across required booking/ordering flows  
**Conclusion:** Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderWorkflowViewModel.kt:53`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:72`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderFinanceViewModel.kt:90`  
**Impact:** Companion ΓÇ£act-on-behalfΓÇ¥ behavior is inconsistent and can misattribute records to companion instead of owner.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Add explicit delegated owner context to meeting/cart/invoice flows and persist owner-vs-actor separately.

5) **Severity: High**  
**Title:** Admin management capabilities are not delivered as operational features  
**Conclusion:** Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/PermissionEvaluator.kt:37`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/security/DeviceBindingService.kt:39`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout/fragment_dashboard.xml:85`  
**Impact:** Prompt-required admin control over resources/rules/access policies cannot be performed through delivered app flow.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Add admin UI/use-cases for resource CRUD, policy/rule updates, and device-binding reset execution.

### Medium / Low

6) **Severity: Medium**  
**Title:** Pending tender timeout uses `Expired` state, not required auto-cancel semantics  
**Conclusion:** Partial Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/orders/OrderStateMachine.kt:109`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/orders/OrderStateMachine.kt:110`  
**Impact:** Downstream business logic/reports may diverge from expected ΓÇ£auto-cancelΓÇ¥ policy wording.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Transition to `Cancelled` with explicit cancellation reason, or codify `Expired` as equivalent in requirements/docs/UI.

7) **Severity: Medium**  
**Title:** Governance/analytics/canary/form subsystems are mostly disconnected from runtime flows  
**Conclusion:** Partial Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/db/GovernanceDao.kt:12`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/governance/RuleHitObserver.kt:14`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/config/CanaryConfig.kt:20`, `composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/ui/form/DynamicFormEngine.kt:40`  
**Impact:** Required governance/canary behavior can exist in code but not in actual user flows.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Wire observers/services into app lifecycle, persist rule hits from validations, and apply canary/form decisions in rendered workflows.

8) **Severity: Medium**  
**Title:** Image downsampling/LRU memory control is implemented but not integrated into attachment flow  
**Conclusion:** Partial Fail  
**Evidence:** `composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/media/ImageBitmapLruCache.kt:5`, `composeApp/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/media/ImageDownsampler.android.kt:7`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:72`  
**Impact:** Prompt requirement on attachment/photo memory behavior is not provably achieved in actual UX.  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Implement attachment capture/select pipeline that uses downsampler+LRU and persists references in meeting/order workflows.

9) **Severity: Medium**  
**Title:** Test suite has substantial realism and consistency gaps  
**Conclusion:** Partial Fail  
**Evidence:** `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/viewmodel/OrderWorkflowViewModelTest.kt:13`, `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/governance/ReconciliationServiceTest.kt:36`, `shared/src/commonTest/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/AbacPolicyEvaluatorTest.kt:87`, `shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/eaglepoint/task136/shared/rbac/AbacPolicyEvaluator.kt:16`  
**Impact:** Severe defects can remain undetected while tests still pass (or tests may be stale/contradictory).  
**Minimum actionable fix:** Add behavior-level tests against real ViewModels/use-cases and align ABAC tests with actual policy semantics.

36: class OrderWorkflowViewModel(

46:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(OrderWorkflowState())
47:     val state: StateFlow<OrderWorkflowState> = _state.asStateFlow()
48: 
49:     /**
50:      * Resolves the effective user ID for order attribution.
51:      * Companions act on behalf of their delegating user.
52:      */
53:     private fun resolveOrderUserId(actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String?): String {
54:         return delegateForUserId ?: actorId
55:     }
56: 
57:     fun createPendingTenderDemo(
58:         role: Role,
59:         actorId: String,
60:         delegateForUserId: String? = null,
61:         paymentMethod: PaymentMethod = PaymentMethod.Cash,
62:     ) {
63:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
64:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
65:             return
66:         }
67:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
68:             ensureDemoResource()
69:             val effectiveUserId = resolveOrderUserId(actorId, delegateForUserId)
70:             val orderId = "ord-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
71:             val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
72:             val totalPrice = 25.50
73:             val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(totalPrice)
74:             if (priceError != null) {
75:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = priceError)
76:                 return@launch
77:             }
78:             val order = OrderEntity(
79:                 id = orderId,
80:                 userId = effectiveUserId,
81:                 resourceId = "res-1",
82:                 state = OrderState.Draft.name,
83:                 startTime = now,
84:                 endTime = clock.now().plus(30.minutes).toEpochMilliseconds(),
85:                 expiresAt = null,
86:                 quantity = 1,
87:                 totalPrice = totalPrice,
88:                 createdAt = now,
89:                 paymentMethod = paymentMethod.name,
90:             )
91:             orderDao.upsert(order)
92:             val transitionError = stateMachine.transitionToPendingTender(orderId, role)
93:             if (transitionError != null) {
94:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = transitionError)
95:                 return@launch
96:             }
97:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderId = orderId, lastOrderState = OrderState.PendingTender.name)
98:         }
99:     }
100: 
101:     fun confirmLastOrder(role: Role) {
102:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
103:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
104:             return
105:         }
106:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
107:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
108:             val success = stateMachine.confirm(orderId, role)
109:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
110:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.Confirmed.name else "Confirm not allowed",
111:             )
112:         }
113:     }
114: 
115:     fun cancelOrder(role: Role) {
116:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
117:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
118:             return
119:         }
120:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
121:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
122:             val success = stateMachine.cancel(orderId, role)
123:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
124:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.Cancelled.name else "Cancel not allowed",
125:             )
126:         }
127:     }
128: 
129:     fun requestReturn(role: Role) {
130:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
131:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
132:             return
133:         }
134:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
135:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
136:             val success = stateMachine.requestReturn(orderId, role)
137:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
138:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.ReturnRequested.name else "Return not allowed",
139:             )
140:         }
141:     }
142: 
143:     fun completeReturn(role: Role) {
144:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
145:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
146:             return
147:         }
148:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
149:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
150:             val success = stateMachine.completeReturn(orderId, role)
151:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
152:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.Returned.name else "Complete return not allowed",
153:             )
154:         }
155:     }
156: 
157:     fun requestExchange(role: Role) {
158:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
159:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
160:             return
161:         }
162:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
163:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
164:             val success = stateMachine.requestExchange(orderId, role)
165:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
166:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.ExchangeRequested.name else "Exchange not allowed",
167:             )
168:         }
169:     }
170: 
171:     fun requestRefund(role: Role) {
172:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write) || role == Role.Companion) {
173:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Refund denied for role")
174:             return
175:         }
176:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
177:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
178:             val success = stateMachine.requestRefund(orderId, role)
179:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
180:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.RefundRequested.name else "Refund not allowed",
181:             )
182:         }
183:     }
184: 
185:     fun completeRefund(role: Role) {
186:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Approve)) {
187:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
188:             return
189:         }
190:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
191:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
192:             val success = stateMachine.completeRefund(orderId, role)
193:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
194:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.Refunded.name else "Complete refund not allowed",
195:             )
196:         }
197:     }
198: 
199:     fun markAwaitingDelivery(role: Role) {
200:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
201:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
202:             return
203:         }
204:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
205:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
206:             val success = stateMachine.markAwaitingDelivery(orderId, role)
207:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
208:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name else "Cannot start delivery",
209:             )
210:         }
211:     }
212: 
213:     fun confirmDelivery(role: Role, signature: String) {
214:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
215:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(lastOrderState = "Denied")
216:             return
217:         }
218:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
219:             val orderId = _state.value.lastOrderId ?: return@launch
220:             val success = stateMachine.confirmDelivery(orderId, signature, role)
221:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
222:                 lastOrderState = if (success) OrderState.Delivered.name else "Cannot confirm delivery",
223:             )
224:         }
225:     }
226: 
227:     fun suggestSlots(role: Role) {
228:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Read)) {
229:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(suggestedSlots = emptyList())
230:             return
231:         }
232:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
233:             ensureDemoResource()
234:             val slots = bookingUseCase.findThreeAvailableSlots(
235:                 resourceId = "res-1",
236:                 duration = 30.minutes,
237:             )
238:             val zone = TimeZone.currentSystemDefault()
239:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(
240:                 suggestedSlots = slots.map {
241:                     val start = it.start.toLocalDateTime(zone)
242:                     "${start.date} ${start.time.hour.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${start.time.minute.toString().padStart(2, '0')}"
243:                 },
244:             )
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     private suspend fun ensureDemoResource() {
249:         if (resourceDao.getById("res-1") != null) return
250:         resourceDao.upsert(
251:             ResourceEntity(
252:                 id = "res-1",
253:                 name = "Premium Hall",
254:                 category = "Operations",
255:                 availableUnits = 4,
256:                 unitPrice = 25.50,
257:                 allergens = "none",
258:             ),
259:         )
260:     }
261: 
262:     fun loadOrderById(orderId: String) {
263:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
264:             val order = orderDao.getById(orderId)
265:             if (order != null) {
266:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(
267:                     lastOrderId = order.id,
268:                     lastOrderState = order.state,
269:                 )
270:             }
271:         }
272:     }
273: 
274:     fun loadOrderById(orderId: String, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
275:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
276:             val order = if (delegateForUserId.isNullOrBlank()) {
277:                 orderDao.getByIdForActor(orderId, actorId)
278:             } else {
279:                 orderDao.getByIdForOwnerOrDelegate(orderId, actorId, delegateForUserId)
280:             }
281:             if (order != null) {
282:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(
283:                     lastOrderId = order.id,
284:                     lastOrderState = order.state,
285:                     error = null,
286:                 )
287:             } else {
288:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(error = "Order not found or access denied")
289:             }
290:         }
291:     }
292: 
293:     fun clearSessionState() {
294:         scope.cancel()
295:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
296:         _state.value = OrderWorkflowState()
297:     }
298: }

(End of file - total 298 lines)
