26: 
27: data class CartItem(
28:     val id: String,
29:     val label: String,
30:     val quantity: Int,
31:     val unitPrice: Double,
32: )
33: 
34: data class InvoiceDraft(
35:     val id: String,
36:     val subtotal: Double,
37:     val tax: Double,
38:     val total: Double,
39:     val orderId: String? = null,
40: )
41: 
42: data class OrderFinanceState(
43:     val cart: List<CartItem> = emptyList(),
44:     val invoices: List<InvoiceDraft> = emptyList(),
45:     val refunds: List<String> = emptyList(),
46:     val note: String? = null,
47: )
48: 
49: class OrderFinanceViewModel(
50:     private val abac: AbacPolicyEvaluator,
51:     private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
52:     private val validationService: ValidationService,
53:     private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService,
54:     private val cartDao: CartDao,
55:     private val stateMachine: OrderStateMachine? = null,
56:     private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
57:     private val receiptGateway: ReceiptGateway,
58:     private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
59: ) {
60:     private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
61:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(OrderFinanceState())
62:     val state: StateFlow<OrderFinanceState> = _state.asStateFlow()
63: 
64:     private suspend fun resolveDeviceTrust(userId: String): Boolean {
65:         return deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(userId, deviceFingerprint)
66:     }
67: 
68:     fun addDemoItem(role: Role, actorId: String) {
69:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
70:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Add item denied for role")
71:             return
72:         }
73:         val unitPrice = 49.99
74:         val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(unitPrice)
75:         if (priceError != null) {
76:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
77:             return
78:         }
79:         val itemId = "item-${_state.value.cart.size + 1}"
80:         val next = CartItem(
81:             id = itemId,
82:             label = "Service Package ${_state.value.cart.size + 1}",
83:             quantity = 1,
84:             unitPrice = unitPrice,
85:         )
86:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = _state.value.cart + next, note = null)
87: 
88:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
89:             cartDao.upsert(
90:                 CartItemEntity(
91:                     id = itemId,
92:                     userId = actorId,
93:                     resourceId = "res-1",
94:                     label = next.label,
95:                     quantity = next.quantity,
96:                     unitPrice = next.unitPrice,
97:                 ),
98:             )
99:         }
100:     }
101: 
102:     fun splitFirstItem(role: Role, actorId: String) {
103:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
104:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split denied for role")
105:             return
106:         }
107:         val first = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull() ?: return
108:         if (first.quantity < 2) {
109:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split requires quantity >= 2")
110:             return
111:         }
112:         val left = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-a", quantity = first.quantity / 2)
113:         val right = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-b", quantity = first.quantity - left.quantity)
114:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(left, right) + _state.value.cart.drop(1), note = "Order split")
115:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
116:             cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(first.id, actorId)
117:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = left.id, userId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = left.label, quantity = left.quantity, unitPrice = left.unitPrice))
118:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = right.id, userId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = right.label, quantity = right.quantity, unitPrice = right.unitPrice))
119:         }
120:     }
121: 
122:     fun mergeFirstTwoItems(role: Role, actorId: String) {
123:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
124:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Merge denied for role")
125:             return
126:         }
127:         val cart = _state.value.cart
128:         if (cart.size < 2) return
129:         val merged = cart[0].copy(
130:             id = "${cart[0].id}+${cart[1].id}",
131:             quantity = cart[0].quantity + cart[1].quantity,
132:             unitPrice = cart[0].unitPrice,
133:         )
134:         _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(merged) + cart.drop(2), note = "Orders merged")
135:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
136:             cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[0].id, actorId)
137:             cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[1].id, actorId)
138:             cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = merged.id, userId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = merged.label, quantity = merged.quantity, unitPrice = merged.unitPrice))
139:         }
140:     }
141: 
142:     fun generateInvoice(role: Role, actorId: String) {
143:         if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
144:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Invoice denied for role")
145:             return
146:         }
147:         if (_state.value.cart.isEmpty()) return
148:         val subtotal = _state.value.cart.sumOf { it.unitPrice * it.quantity }
149:         val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(subtotal)
150:         if (priceError != null) {
151:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
152:             return
153:         }
154: 
155:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
156:             val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
157:             val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
158:             val tax = if (abac.canReadInvoiceTaxField(role, context)) subtotal * 0.12 else 0.0
159:             val invoice = InvoiceDraft(
160:                 id = "inv-${_state.value.invoices.size + 1}",
161:                 subtotal = subtotal,
162:                 tax = tax,
163:                 total = subtotal + tax,
164:                 orderId = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull()?.id,
165:             )
166:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(invoices = _state.value.invoices + invoice, note = "Invoice generated")
167: 
168:             try {
169:                 notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(invoice.id, invoice.total)
170:             } catch (_: Exception) { /* notification scheduling is best-effort */ }
171: 
172:             try {
173:                 val receiptItems = _state.value.cart.map {
174:                     ReceiptLineItem(label = it.label, amount = it.quantity * it.unitPrice)
175:                 }
176:                 receiptGateway.shareReceipt(invoice.id, actorId, receiptItems, invoice.total)
177:             } catch (_: Exception) { /* receipt generation is best-effort */ }
178:         }
179:     }
180: 
181:     fun refundLatest(role: Role, actorId: String) {
182:         val latest = _state.value.invoices.lastOrNull() ?: return
183:         scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
184:             val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
185:             val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
186:             if (!abac.canIssueRefund(role, context)) {
187:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund denied for role")
188:                 return@launch
189:             }
190:             val orderId = latest.orderId
191:             if (orderId == null || stateMachine == null) {
192:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund requires a linked order")
193:                 return@launch
194:             }
195:             val requested = stateMachine.requestRefund(orderId, role)
196:             val completed = if (requested) stateMachine.completeRefund(orderId, role) else false
197:             if (!requested || !completed) {
198:                 _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund state transition failed")
199:                 return@launch
200:             }
201:             _state.value = _state.value.copy(refunds = _state.value.refunds + "Refunded ${latest.id}", note = "Refund completed")
202:         }
203:     }
204: 
205:     fun clearSessionState() {
206:         scope.cancel()
207:         scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
208:         _state.value = OrderFinanceState()
209:     }
210: }

(End of file - total 210 lines)
</content>

8: class DeviceBindingService(
9:     private val deviceBindingDao: DeviceBindingDao,
10:     private val clock: Clock,
11:     private val maxDevices: Int = 2,
12: ) {
13:     suspend fun checkAndBindDevice(userId: String, deviceFingerprint: String): DeviceBindingResult {
14:         val existing = deviceBindingDao.findByUserAndDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint)
15:         if (existing != null) {
16:             return DeviceBindingResult.Allowed
17:         }
18: 
19:         val count = deviceBindingDao.countByUserId(userId)
20:         if (count >= maxDevices) {
21:             return DeviceBindingResult.LimitExceeded(bound = count, max = maxDevices)
22:         }
23: 
24:         deviceBindingDao.upsert(
25:             DeviceBindingEntity(
26:                 id = "$userId-$deviceFingerprint",
27:                 userId = userId,
28:                 deviceFingerprint = deviceFingerprint,
29:                 boundAt = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds(),
30:             ),
31:         )
32:         return DeviceBindingResult.Allowed
33:     }
34: 
35:     suspend fun isDeviceTrusted(userId: String, deviceFingerprint: String): Boolean {
36:         return deviceBindingDao.findByUserAndDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint) != null
37:     }
38: 
39:     suspend fun adminResetBindings(adminRole: Role, userId: String): Boolean {
40:         if (adminRole != Role.Admin) return false
41:         deviceBindingDao.deleteAllForUser(userId)
42:         return true
43:     }
44: 
45:     suspend fun getDeviceCount(userId: String): Int {
46:         return deviceBindingDao.countByUserId(userId)
47:     }
48: }
49: 
50: sealed class DeviceBindingResult {
51:     data object Allowed : DeviceBindingResult()
52:     data class LimitExceeded(val bound: Int, val max: Int) : DeviceBindingResult()
53: }

package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db

import androidx.room.Entity
import androidx.room.Index
import androidx.room.PrimaryKey

@Entity(
    tableName = "users",
    indices = [Index(value = ["role", "isActive"])],
)
data class UserEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val fullName: String,
    val email: String,
    val role: String,
    val passwordHash: String = "",
    val passwordSalt: String = "",
    val delegateForUserId: String? = null,
    val maskedPII: String,
    val encryptedWalletRef: String,
    val isActive: Boolean,
    val failedAttempts: Int = 0,
    val lockedUntil: Long? = null,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "resources",
    indices = [Index(value = ["category", "availableUnits"])],
)
data class ResourceEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val name: String,
    val category: String,
    val availableUnits: Int,
    val unitPrice: Double,
    val allergens: String = "",
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "cart_items",
    indices = [Index(value = ["userId"])],
)
data class CartItemEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val label: String,
    val quantity: Int,
    val unitPrice: Double,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "orders",
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["resourceId", "startTime"]),
        Index(value = ["state", "expiresAt"]),
        Index(value = ["userId", "state"]),
        Index(value = ["state", "createdAt"]),
    ],
)
data class OrderEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val state: String,
    val startTime: Long,
    val endTime: Long,
    val expiresAt: Long?,
    val quantity: Int,
    val totalPrice: Double,
    val createdAt: Long = 0L,
    val paymentMethod: String = "Cash",
    val deliveryState: String = "None",
    val deliverySignature: String? = null,
    val notes: String? = null,
    val tags: String = "",
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "order_line_items",
    indices = [Index(value = ["orderId"])],
)
data class OrderLineItemEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val orderId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val label: String,
    val quantity: Int,
    val unitPrice: Double,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "device_bindings",
    indices = [Index(value = ["userId"])],
)
data class DeviceBindingEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val deviceFingerprint: String,
    val boundAt: Long,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "rule_hits",
    indices = [Index(value = ["createdAt", "resolved"])],
)
data class RuleHitMetricEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val ruleName: String,
    val valueObserved: Double,
    val createdAt: Long,
    val resolved: Boolean,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "daily_ledger",
    indices = [Index(value = ["businessDate"], unique = true)],
)
data class DailyLedgerEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val businessDate: String,
    val grossTotal: Double,
    val netTotal: Double,
    val closedAt: Long?,
    val isClosed: Boolean,
)

@Entity(tableName = "discrepancy_tickets")
data class DiscrepancyTicketEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val ledgerDate: String,
    val reason: String,
    val amountDelta: Double,
    val createdAt: Long,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "meetings",
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["organizerId", "startTime"]),
        Index(value = ["resourceId", "startTime"]),
    ],
)
data class MeetingEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val organizerId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val title: String,
    val startTime: Long,
    val endTime: Long,
    val status: String,
    val agenda: String = "",
    val attachmentPath: String? = null,
    val note: String? = null,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "meeting_attendees",
    indices = [Index(value = ["meetingId"])],
)
data class MeetingAttendeeEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val meetingId: String,
    val userId: String,
    val displayName: String,
    val rsvpStatus: String = "Pending",
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "courses",
    indices = [Index(value = ["category"])],
)
data class CourseEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val title: String,
    val description: String,
    val category: String,
    val durationMinutes: Int,
    val isActive: Boolean = true,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "enrollments",
    indices = [Index(value = ["userId", "courseId"])],
)
data class EnrollmentEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val courseId: String,
    val status: String = "NotStarted",
    val progressPercent: Int = 0,
    val enrolledAt: Long,
    val completedAt: Long? = null,
)

        Index(value = ["userId", "state"]),
        Index(value = ["state", "createdAt"]),
    ],
)
data class OrderEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val state: String,
    val startTime: Long,
    val endTime: Long,
    val expiresAt: Long?,
    val quantity: Int,
    val totalPrice: Double,
    val createdAt: Long = 0L,
    val paymentMethod: String = "Cash",
    val deliveryState: String = "None",
    val deliverySignature: String? = null,
    val notes: String? = null,
    val tags: String = "",
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "order_line_items",
    indices = [Index(value = ["orderId"])],
)
data class OrderLineItemEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val orderId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val label: String,
    val quantity: Int,
    val unitPrice: Double,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "device_bindings",
    indices = [Index(value = ["userId"])],
)
data class DeviceBindingEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val userId: String,
    val deviceFingerprint: String,
    val boundAt: Long,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "rule_hits",
    indices = [Index(value = ["createdAt", "resolved"])],
)
data class RuleHitMetricEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val ruleName: String,
    val valueObserved: Double,
    val createdAt: Long,
    val resolved: Boolean,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "daily_ledger",
    indices = [Index(value = ["businessDate"], unique = true)],
)
data class DailyLedgerEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val businessDate: String,
    val grossTotal: Double,
    val netTotal: Double,
    val closedAt: Long?,
    val isClosed: Boolean,
)

@Entity(tableName = "discrepancy_tickets")
data class DiscrepancyTicketEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val ledgerDate: String,
    val reason: String,
    val amountDelta: Double,
    val createdAt: Long,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "meetings",
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["organizerId", "startTime"]),
        Index(value = ["resourceId", "startTime"]),
    ],
)
data class MeetingEntity(
    @PrimaryKey val id: String,
    val organizerId: String,
    val resourceId: String,
    val title: String,
    val startTime: Long,
    val endTime: Long,
    val status: String,
    val agenda: String = "",

)

@Entity(
    tableName = "meeting_attendees",

)
data class MeetingAttendeeEntity(

    val meetingId: String,
    val userId: String,
    val displayName: String,
    val rsvpStatus: String = "Pending",
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "courses",
    indices = [Index(value = ["category"])],
)
data class CourseEntity(

    val title: String,
    val description: String,
    val category: String,
    val durationMinutes: Int,
    val isActive: Boolean = true,
)

@Entity(
    tableName = "enrollments",
    indices = [Index(value = ["userId", "courseId"])],
)
data class EnrollmentEntity(

    val userId: String,
    val courseId: String,
    val status: String = "NotStarted",
    val progressPercent: Int = 0,
    val enrolledAt: Long,
    val completedAt: Long? = null,
)

{"patchText": "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: C:\Users\amana\OneDrive\Desktop\Files\Eaglepoint\March 30\Task-136\repo\README.md
+# Task-136 Offline Operations Suite
+
+This repository contains a Kotlin Multiplatform app with Android Views UI (`composeApp`) and shared domain/data logic (`shared`).
+
+## Prerequisites
+
+- JDK 17+
+- Android SDK (set `ANDROID_HOME` or `sdk.dir` in `local.properties`)
+- Android platform tools (`adb`) for install/run
+- Docker (optional, for containerized build/test path)
+
+## Project Modules
+
+- `:shared` - KMP shared logic (Room entities/DAO, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, tests)
+- `:composeApp` - Android app module (Activity, Fragments, layouts, manifest)
+
+Declared in `settings.gradle.kts`.
+
+## Bootstrap and Startup
+
+1. Build shared tests/artifacts:
+
+```bash
+./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
+```
+
+2. Build Android debug app:
+
+```bash
+./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
+```
+
+3. Install on device/emulator:
+
+```bash
+adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
+```
+
+4. Launch app entry point:
+
+- Activity: `com.eaglepoint.task136.MainActivity`
+- Manifest: `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml`
+
+Windows PowerShell equivalents:
+
+```powershell
+.\gradlew.bat :shared:testDebugUnitTest
+.\gradlew.bat :composeApp:assembleDebug
+adb install -r composeApp\build\outputs\apk\debug\composeApp-debug.apk
+```
+
+## Test Commands
+
+- Preferred local path (non-Docker):
+
+```bash
+./run_tests.sh
+```
+
+`run_tests.sh` first tries local Gradle wrappers, then falls back to Docker if wrappers are unavailable.
+
+- Direct Gradle:
+
+```bash
+./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
+```
+
+## Demo/Bootstrap Accounts
+
+In debug builds, demo users are seeded at first launch from `LocalAuthService`:
+
+- `admin` / `Admin1234!`
+- `supervisor` / `Super1234!`
+- `operator` / `Oper12345!`
+- `viewer` / `Viewer1234`
+- `companion` / `Companion1!` (delegated to operator)
+
+## Static Verification Playbook
+
+Use this checklist for review without emulator instrumentation:
+
+1. **Build graph and module wiring**
+   - Confirm `settings.gradle.kts` includes only `:shared` and `:composeApp`
+   - Confirm app entry is `MainActivity` in manifest
+
+2. **Security controls**
+   - Verify session expiry hooks in `MainActivity`
+   - Verify attendee read/write ABAC checks in `MeetingWorkflowViewModel`
+   - Verify object-level DAO filters (`OrderDao`, `CartDao`, `MeetingDao`)
+
+3. **Required Android Views flows**
+   - Verify fragment navigation for Calendar, Meeting Detail, Invoice Detail
+   - Confirm corresponding XML layouts exist under `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout`
+
+4. **Finance and receipts**
+   - Verify refund path uses `OrderStateMachine` transition success checks
+   - Verify receipt sharing uses `FileProvider` and chooser intent on Android
+
+5. **Delegation attribution**
+   - Confirm owner-vs-actor context propagation in order/cart/meeting flows
+   - Confirm companion operations can execute on behalf of delegated owner
+
+6. **Unit tests**
+   - Run `./run_tests.sh`
+   - If SDK path missing, configure `ANDROID_HOME` or `local.properties` and rerun
+
*** End Patch"}

files.after:
# Task-136 Offline Operations Suite

This repository contains a Kotlin Multiplatform app with Android Views UI (`composeApp`) and shared domain/data logic (`shared`).

## Prerequisites

- JDK 17+
- Android SDK (set `ANDROID_HOME` or `sdk.dir` in `local.properties`)
- Android platform tools (`adb`) for install/run
- Docker (optional, for containerized build/test path)

## Project Modules

- `:shared` - KMP shared logic (Room entities/DAO, RBAC/ABAC, ViewModels, workflows, tests)
- `:composeApp` - Android app module (Activity, Fragments, layouts, manifest)

Declared in `settings.gradle.kts`.

## Bootstrap and Startup

1. Build shared tests/artifacts:

```bash
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

2. Build Android debug app:

```bash
./gradlew :composeApp:assembleDebug
```

3. Install on device/emulator:

```bash
adb install -r composeApp/build/outputs/apk/debug/composeApp-debug.apk
```

4. Launch app entry point:

- Activity: `com.eaglepoint.task136.MainActivity`
- Manifest: `composeApp/src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml`

Windows PowerShell equivalents:

```powershell
.\gradlew.bat :shared:testDebugUnitTest
.\gradlew.bat :composeApp:assembleDebug
adb install -r composeApp\build\outputs\apk\debug\composeApp-debug.apk
```

## Test Commands

- Preferred local path (non-Docker):

```bash
./run_tests.sh
```

`run_tests.sh` first tries local Gradle wrappers, then falls back to Docker if wrappers are unavailable.

- Direct Gradle:

```bash
./gradlew :shared:testDebugUnitTest
```

## Demo/Bootstrap Accounts

In debug builds, demo users are seeded at first launch from `LocalAuthService`:

- `admin` / `Admin1234!`
- `supervisor` / `Super1234!`
- `operator` / `Oper12345!`
- `viewer` / `Viewer1234`
- `companion` / `Companion1!` (delegated to operator)

## Static Verification Playbook

Use this checklist for review without emulator instrumentation:

1. **Build graph and module wiring**
   - Confirm `settings.gradle.kts` includes only `:shared` and `:composeApp`
   - Confirm app entry is `MainActivity` in manifest

2. **Security controls**
   - Verify session expiry hooks in `MainActivity`
   - Verify attendee read/write ABAC checks in `MeetingWorkflowViewModel`
   - Verify object-level DAO filters (`OrderDao`, `CartDao`, `MeetingDao`)

3. **Required Android Views flows**
   - Verify fragment navigation for Calendar, Meeting Detail, Invoice Detail
   - Confirm corresponding XML layouts exist under `composeApp/src/androidMain/res/layout`

4. **Finance and receipts**
   - Verify refund path uses `OrderStateMachine` transition success checks
   - Verify receipt sharing uses `FileProvider` and chooser intent on Android

5. **Delegation attribution**
   - Confirm owner-vs-actor context propagation in order/cart/meeting flows
   - Confirm companion operations can execute on behalf of delegated owner

6. **Unit tests**
   - Run `./run_tests.sh`
   - If SDK path missing, configure `ANDROID_HOME` or `local.properties` and rerun

package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db

import androidx.room.Database
import androidx.room.RoomDatabase

@Database(
    entities = [
        UserEntity::class,
        ResourceEntity::class,
        CartItemEntity::class,
        OrderEntity::class,
        OrderLineItemEntity::class,
        DeviceBindingEntity::class,
        RuleHitMetricEntity::class,
        DailyLedgerEntity::class,
        DiscrepancyTicketEntity::class,
        MeetingEntity::class,
        MeetingAttendeeEntity::class,
        CourseEntity::class,
        EnrollmentEntity::class,
    ],
    version = 6,
    exportSchema = true,
)
abstract class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    abstract fun userDao(): UserDao
    abstract fun resourceDao(): ResourceDao
    abstract fun cartDao(): CartDao
    abstract fun orderDao(): OrderDao
    abstract fun orderLineItemDao(): OrderLineItemDao
    abstract fun deviceBindingDao(): DeviceBindingDao
    abstract fun governanceDao(): GovernanceDao
    abstract fun meetingDao(): MeetingDao
    abstract fun learningDao(): LearningDao
}

198:                 order.state != OrderState.Delivered.name &&
199:                 order.state != OrderState.Returned.name
200:             ) return@runInTransaction false
201:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.RefundRequested.name))
202:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Refund requested for $orderId")
203:             true
204:         }
205:     }
206: 
207:     suspend fun completeRefund(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
208:         if (role == null || (role != Role.Admin && role != Role.Supervisor)) return false
209:         return runInTransaction {
210:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
211:             if (order.state != OrderState.RefundRequested.name) return@runInTransaction false
212:             database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Refunded.name))
213:             restockInventory(order)
214:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Refund completed for $orderId, inventory restocked")
215:             true
216:         }
217:     }
218: 
219:     suspend fun markAwaitingDelivery(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
220:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
221:         return runInTransaction {
222:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
223:             if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name) return@runInTransaction false
224:             database.orderDao().update(
225:                 order.copy(
226:                     state = OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name,
227:                     deliveryState = DeliveryState.AwaitingDelivery.name,
228:                 ),
229:             )
230:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId awaiting delivery")
231:             true
232:         }
233:     }
234: 
235:     suspend fun markInTransit(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
236:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
237:         return runInTransaction {
238:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
239:             if (order.state != OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name) return@runInTransaction false
240:             database.orderDao().update(
241:                 order.copy(deliveryState = DeliveryState.InTransit.name),
242:             )
243:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId marked in transit")
244:             true
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     suspend fun confirmDelivery(orderId: String, signature: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
249:         if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
250:         return runInTransaction {
251:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
252:             if (order.state != OrderState.AwaitingDelivery.name) return@runInTransaction false
253:             database.orderDao().update(
254:                 order.copy(
255:                     state = OrderState.Delivered.name,
256:                     deliveryState = DeliveryState.DeliveryConfirmed.name,
257:                     deliverySignature = signature,
258:                 ),
259:             )
260:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Delivery confirmed for $orderId with signature")
261:             true
262:         }
263:     }
264: 
265:     suspend fun splitOrder(orderId: String, splitQuantity: Int): Pair<String, String>? {
266:         return runInTransaction {
267:             val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction null
268:             if (order.quantity < 2 || splitQuantity < 1 || splitQuantity >= order.quantity) return@runInTransaction null
269: 
270:             val leftQty = splitQuantity
271:             val rightQty = order.quantity - splitQuantity
272:             val leftPrice = kotlin.math.round(order.totalPrice * leftQty / order.quantity * 100) / 100.0
273:             val rightPrice = kotlin.math.round((order.totalPrice - leftPrice) * 100) / 100.0
274: 
275:             val leftId = "${orderId}-a"
276:             val rightId = "${orderId}-b"
277: 
278:             val leftOrder = order.copy(
279:                 id = leftId,
280:                 quantity = leftQty,
281:                 totalPrice = leftPrice,
282:                 state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
283:             )
284:             val rightOrder = order.copy(
285:                 id = rightId,
286:                 quantity = rightQty,
287:                 totalPrice = rightPrice,
288:                 state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
289:             )
290: 
291:             database.orderDao().upsert(leftOrder)
292:             database.orderDao().upsert(rightOrder)
293:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId)
294: 
295:             val lineItems = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId)
296:             lineItems.forEach { item ->
297:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-a", orderId = leftId))
298:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-b", orderId = rightId))
299:             }
300: 
301:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId split into $leftId and $rightId")
302:             Pair(leftId, rightId)
303:         }
304:     }
305: 
306:     suspend fun mergeOrders(orderId1: String, orderId2: String): String? {
307:         return runInTransaction {
308:             val order1 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId1) ?: return@runInTransaction null
309:             val order2 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId2) ?: return@runInTransaction null
310:             if (order1.userId != order2.userId) return@runInTransaction null
311: 
312:             val mergedId = "${orderId1}+${orderId2}"
313:             val merged = order1.copy(
314:                 id = mergedId,
315:                 quantity = order1.quantity + order2.quantity,
316:                 totalPrice = order1.totalPrice + order2.totalPrice,
317:             )
318:             database.orderDao().upsert(merged)
319:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId1)
320:             database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId2)
321: 
322:             val items1 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId1)
323:             val items2 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId2)
324:             (items1 + items2).forEach { item ->
325:                 database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(orderId = mergedId))
326:             }
327: 
328:             AppLogger.i(TAG, "Orders $orderId1 and $orderId2 merged into $mergedId")
329:             mergedId
330:         }
331:     }
332: 
333:     suspend fun expireStaleOrders() {
334:         val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
335:         val stale = database.orderDao().getExpiredPendingOrders(now)
336:         stale.forEach { order ->
337:             runInTransaction {
338:                 val latest = database.orderDao().getById(order.id) ?: return@runInTransaction
339:                 if (latest.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name) {
340:                     database.orderDao().update(latest.copy(state = OrderState.Expired.name))
341:                     restockInventory(latest)
342:                     AppLogger.i(TAG, "Stale order ${order.id} expired on startup, inventory restocked")
343:                 }
344:             }
345:         }
346:     }
347: 
348:     private suspend fun restockInventory(order: OrderEntity) {
349:         val resource = database.resourceDao().getById(order.resourceId) ?: return
350:         database.resourceDao().update(resource.copy(availableUnits = resource.availableUnits + order.quantity))
351:     }
352: }

(End of file - total 352 lines)
</content>
